faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Des programme at NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer: The total fee for the UG programme is inclusive of various components, such as tuition fees, caution deposits, and more. NIFT Delhi tuition fee amount is INR 12.34 lakh, the hostel fee is INR 4.19 lakh, and the one-time fee cost is INR 27,200. Students need to pay the course fee amount for final selection to confirm their admission to the institute. It must be noted by the candidates that the mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of pursuing B.Des from NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer:
BDes from NIFT Delhi can be worth pursuing due to its reputation in fashion industry. Below mentioned are the benefits of choosing BDes from NIFT Delhi:
NIFT Delhi has been ranked 1 by The Week, India Today and Outlook in 2024 under the 'Fashion Design' category.
It has well-qualified faculty with years of experience. 
NIFT Delhi offers financial assistance through Means-Cum-Merit scheme to the students from lower income background.
The institute offers internship programs with leading fashion brands and designers.
Top recruiters at NIFT Delhi include Myntra, Nike, Fabindia, etc. The highest package offered to the NIFT students in 2024 stood up to INR 12 - INR 15 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the course fees for four-year BDes in NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer:
The fee structure is inclusive of different components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, refundable security deposit, registration fee, etc. A few of these components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually or semester-wise. Once selection procedure is completed, students need to pay the NIFT Delhi BDes fees. The following table showcases the fee bifurcation:

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Fashion Technology offers B.Des and B.FTech courses at the undergraduate level. NIFT Delhi offers M.Des, MFM and M.FTech courses at the postgraduate level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, NIFT Delhi also offers a list of UG Diploma and Continuing Education (CE) short-term programmes with a course duration ranging between three months and one year depending on the course.

college_info.intro:
NIFT Delhi offers undergraduate, postgraduate and Continuing Education (CE)/ diploma programmes in the stream of Fashion and Design. At the UG level, it offers BDes and BFTech programmes, while at the PG level, NIFT Delhi offers two-year master’s programmes such as MDes, MFM and MFTech.
BDes and MDes are among the most popular programmes offered at the institute. The seat intake of the BDes specialisations ranges from 159 to 165. The BDes programme is offered in 6 specialisations, listed below:
Check out more details in the below video:

The final selections are done through Group Discussion (GD), Personal Interview (PI) or Counseling rounds. The fees for various courses may vary based on the type and level of the program. Below mentioned are the highlights regarding NIFT Delhi fees, and courses, along with their eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    NIFT Delhi provides Fashion and Design courses across various specialisations. BDes is one of the flagship programmes of NIFT Delhi. The total tuition fee for the NIFT BDes course is INR 12.34 Lacs. Admission to the course is based on NIFT entrance exam followed by situation tests, personal interviews, and counselling. Interested candidates can visit the official website and fill out the application form.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Des at NIFT Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Delhi's total tuition fee for the BDes course is INR 12.3 lakh. Apart from the total tuition fee, a one-time payment of INR 17,900 (refundable) will be also charged at the time of admission. This one-time refundable payment includes a Security deposit of INR 12,000 and an Alumni Association Membership fee of INR 5,900. For a detailed NIFT Delhi BDes fee structure, click here. This fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How much is the NIFT Delhi B.Des fee?

faqs.answer: A:    The time before joining the college is exciting and full of doubts as well. A lot of online portals suggest students join Sketching, Perspective, Drawing, etc. While students can start working on developing these skills, it is also important to enjoy this time by focusing on developing soft skills, such as communication, public speaking, etc. The students can also start developing a professional portfolio and build it during the NIFT Delhi BDes in Fashion Design programme.
faqs.question: How should I utilize one month before joining NIFT Delhi for BDes in Fashion Design?

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Delhi offers seat reservations to candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/GEN and PWD categories. Thus, these category candidates can apply for admission under these categories. The relevant category certificate has to be submitted for verification purposes. The seats are confirmed only after verification. Moreover, there are a total of 43 seats for the MDes programme. This seat count is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: National Institute of Fashion Technology isn't for everyone.

review_content.Placements: A lot of MNCs come to the college every year, and many students get placed, but it's a hard competition. The highest package is 16 LPA to 18 LPA, while the average is 7 LPA to 8 LPA. Companies like Aditya Birla, L&T, etc., hire students. Internships depend on your skills. I have seen people working as interns in H&M as well as unemployed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with stone walls and AC labs. There are two divisions of the college, new and old. The new one has better classrooms, while the old one needs a bit of refurbishing. The canteen and water supply aren't great, and there's only a girls' hostel, no boys' hostel available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.FTech. in Apparel Production - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good course and curriculum, best campus life.

review_content.Placements: At least half of the batch got placed with either PPO or campus placement drive. The package offered is up to 6 LPA-7.5 LPA. Top roles offered are buyer, merchandiser, and consultant. Top recruiters are Wazir, Aditya Birla, etc. All students secured internships with the help of professors or seniors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are all in good condition. Labs are top-notch. Canteen food is okayish, cold coffee is the best. Labs stay open as late as 9:00 PM depending on the workload. Basketball court is available. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Proud of my decision of choosing to come here.

review_content.Placements: Usually, all the students get placed. Either through college placements, faculty's help, or through connections/college exposure. The highest package is 60k p/m and the lowest package is 20k p/m. Fashion designer, analyst, stylist, and forecaster are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Provides Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, 3D printers, the highest technologies, library, hostels for girls only, play areas, etc. The faculty members also stay here till 7 p.m., so it’s usually good for asking doubts and seeking help. Quality and cleanliness are really good here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Textile Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for Textile design.

review_content.Placements: NIFT Delhi is a very popular and very good college in India. Our NIFT Delhi gives 99% placements and internship facilities. Placements are give according to your studies. The highest salary package is 11 to 12 LPA, average salary package is 7 LPA and the lowest salary package is 4 LPA. Students are placed in many textile and design companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is so good. Inside our college, we are inspired by many small things of the college. Our classrooms are very big and projectors connected. Very good quality hostels available. All types of references books available in our library. Canteen and food court are good to go. High-speed internet facilities available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Leather Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college teachers are very helpful and various facilities are available.

review_content.Placements: The leather design department has a good placement record above 90-95%. This course the highest salary package offered was 12 LPA and average salary package offered was 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Index Sports, Lexus, metropoli fashion and so on. Our college gives a internship facilities. This course top roles are Range develops, buyers, production manager etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure are so good. Big classrooms are available, all rooms LAN and projectors are connected. Wi-Fi speed is so good. All types of reference book available in our library. Inside our college hostel and food court facilities are available. Our college organized per year sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Leather Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Senior and very experienced faculty members are available in our college.

review_content.Placements: In our course above 95% placements students are placed. This course the highest salary package offered was 12 LPA and average salary package offered was 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are XL enterprise, Bata, khadims and so on. In our course almost 90% students are get internship facilities. In this course top roles are Leather designer, Production manager etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provide quality Infrastructure and they have solve the problem regular basis. Big classrooms are available and Wi-Fi speed is so good. Lab rooms are AC connected. Quality hostel facilities are available in our college also the food court inside our college. Medical stuff are really very helpful. Every year our college organized Sports and games.

course_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing B.Des at NIFT Delhi?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BDes at NIFT Delhi is generally considered to be worth pursuing. The institute is well-reputed for its fashion and design courses. NIFT Delhi provides decent placement opportunities with the highest package as INR 12 LPA. NIFT Delhihas several popular alumni, including Sabyasachi Mukherjee, Ritu Beri, Rohit Bal, etc. A degree from NIFT Delhi holds value in the fashion industry.

admission_overview.title: NIFT Delhi Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description:
NIFT Delhi admissions are based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. NIFT Delhi conducts its own entrance test - NIFTEE comprising CAT (Creative Ability Test) and GAT (General Ability Test). For UG courses, aspirants also need to appear for a situation test. Those who are selected have to further pass the personal interview round conducted by the institute. NIFT Delhi offers BDes and BFTech at UG and MDes and MFM at the PG levels. Students can apply online for the preferred programme. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Nation Institute of Fashion Technology, Delhi. Download:
NIFT Delhi Admission Guidelines 2026

The National Institute of Fashion Technology Delhi offers BDes and BFTech courses at the UG level. It offers M.Des, MFTech and MFM courses at the PG level. Students have to appear for the NIFTEE followed by situation tests, personal interviews, and Counselling. faqs.question: Who is eligible for NIFT Delhi admissions?

faqs.answer: Yes, NIFT Delhi does have an entrance exam to shortlist students for admissions. The institute accepts NIFT Entrance Exam - NIFTEE. The test is conducted by NTA for admission to BDes, BFTech, MDes, MFTech, NLEA programmes. Students can check the institute's site to know more.
faqs.question: Does NIFT Delhi have an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: For NIFT Delhi B.Des admission, candidates must have passed Class 12 from any recognised Central/State Board of Secondary Examination, such as Central Board of Secondary Education/ State Board New Delhi/ Council for Indian School of Certificate Examination, New Delhi. A passing grade in the Senior Secondary School examination conducted by the National Open School with a minimum of five subjects is also eligible to apply for the National Institute of Fashion Technology Delhi.
faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement for NIFT Delhi BDes admission?

paragraphs: NIFT Delhi admission criteriais completely entrance-based. Students who meet the course-specific eligibility can take the NIFT entrance exam to get a seat in the desired programme. TheNIFT Delhi admission processinvolves online registration, entrance test, result declaration, counselling and seat allotment. A quick guide for the same is as below:
NIFT Delhi Application 2026
Students who fulfil the course-specific eligibility can fill up the application form online at the institute's site. The form has to be submitted with documents and application fees.
Appear for the Entrance Exam

In the next step, the applicant has to appear for theNIFT Entrance Exam. This entrance test is conducted in two parts: written exams and situation tests/personal interviews. Moreover, the written exam is conducted in online mode. The test is divded inGeneral Ability TestandCreative Ability Test. The situation test is in offline mode and the personal interview is in online mode.
Release of Cutoff List and Counselling

After the selection rounds,NIFT Delhi cutoff listis relesed. The cutoff marks change from one course to another. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks become eligible for counselling. During counselling, a seat allotment procedure is carried out. The complete schedule regarding the same shall be available on the NIFT official website.
Verification of Documents & Payment of NIFT Delhi Fees
After seat allotment, candidates may have to submit the important documents at the institute. Along with this, candidates are asked to pay some amount of fees as well for seat confirmation.

The components included in theNIFT Delhi fee structureare tuition fee, hostel fees, etc. Some components are paid every semester, while some are one-time. Students can pay the fees through UPI/ Net banking/ Credit Card/ Debit Card, etc. Students must pay the fee within the specified time to avoid cancellation of admission. faqs.question: Is it difficult to get admission at NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer: NIFT Delhi is one of the top Design institutes in India. It is the only institute in India to be ranked on the list of top 20 Design colleges, internationally. Getting admission to NIFT Delhi is every aspirant's dream. However, only a few are able to get admission to NIFTs, as the NIFT entrance exam it is not very easy to crack it. Candidates aspiring for NIFT Delhi need to cover important aspects such as Case Study, Analytical and Logical Ability, GK and Current Affairs, Quantitative Ability, Communication Ability and English Comprehension to crack the NIFT entrance exam. So, yes NIFT is difficult to get but with the rit approach and preparation, it is not impossible to crack the NIFT entrance test.

faqs.question: Can I get NIFT Delhi without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, the National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) only offers admission basis of candidates' performance in the NIFT entrance exam. Conducted by NIFT Delhi, the National Institute of Fashion Technology entrance exam is the only accepting exam for admission to NIFT Delhi for several UG, PG and UG Diploma courses. The final selection is based on Situation Test and Personal Interview.

faqs.question: How should I utilize one month before joining NIFT Delhi for BDes in Fashion Design?
faqs.answer: The time before joining the college is exciting and full of doubts as well. A lot of online portals suggest students join Sketching, Perspective, Drawing, etc. While students can start working on developing these skills, it is also important to enjoy this time by focusing on developing soft skills, such as communication, public speaking, etc. The students can also start developing a professional portfolio and build it during the NIFT Delhi BDes in Fashion Design programme.

placement_data.title: NIFT Delhi Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The phase 2 (online) of NIFT Delhi placement process was held from May 15 to May 18, 2024. Meanwhile, NIFT placements do take place every year. NIFT Delhi placements brochure 2024 is available on the official website. According to students’ reviews, the placement rate recorded during BDes placements 2024 and in recent past was 99%. The highest , average and lowest package offered was INR 12 LPA , INR 7 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, as per the unofficial sources - the highest package offered to the batch 2022 ranged between INR 12 LPA and INR 15 LPA . NIFT Delhi students bag decent internships during the academic years wherein the stipend paid ranged between INR 5,000 to INR 7,000 per month .

faqs.question: Is NIFT Delhi better than other campus, in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: According to India, Today Ranking 2022, NIFT Delhi is ranked 1 among all campuses that is followed by NIFT Mumbai and NIFT Bangalore. However, it is to note that NIFT has a centralised placement process across all its campuses. Companies can employ NIFT students from any course or campus through On-campus placement and Pre-placement offers.

faqs.question: What is the placement process at NIFT Delhi?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Fashion Technology has a centralised placement process across all its campuses. Companies can employ NIFT students from any course or campus through On-campus placement and Pre-placement offers. In On-campus placement process, companies register for campus placement on a respective date as mentioned in the campus placement schedule. Apart from this, companies also offer pre-placements to students’ basis the projects / training / internships undertaken by the students.

faqs.question: How to prepare for NIFT Delhi placement drive?
faqs.answer: Since, NIFT conducts a centralised placement drive across all NIFT campuses, the institute has not released an exclusive placement report 2023. However, the following points might help students in order to prepare for NIFT placement drive: Students need to get engaged with various workshops and interactions involving internal and external experts Communicate with alumni and industry leaders Classroom projects Industry visit Exposure to exhibitions and fairs Internships Practical knowledge on various projects

library.description:
NIFT Resource Centre has integrated collection of print and non-print materials and is the only systematically documented source of information available in India for the study of international and contemporary Indian fashion.Comprises of a rich collection of e-books and other digital resources including leading online databases are available for
reference.The print collections include books and periodicals pertaining to fashion
studies and related disciplines.All RCs subscribe to leading international fashion forecast services and journals on fashion and textiles.The audio-visual materials in CDs and DVDs are primarily used as teaching aid. AV collections pertain to history of
costume and art; fashion illustration, garment manufacturing and design collections of NIFT graduates. RCs showcase designer clothing and regional costumes of India.
International collections include costumes from different countries of the world and garments from leading multinational fashion houses.

sports.description: There are sports clubs at NIFT Delhi that promote activities related to sports. The various sports available at NIFT Delhi include Table Tennis, Volleyball, Basketball, Badminton, Throwball and Cricket. The Sports Club promotes all activities related to Sports. The activities are divided into leagues according to the sport. Throughout the year, the leagues promote participation among the student community through on-campus tournaments. The core teams across campuses compete in the main annual meet, Converge. Some teams also get opportunities to compete in sports events hosted by other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Fashion Technology isn't for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with stone walls and AC labs. There are two divisions of the college, new and old. The new one has better classrooms, while the old one needs a bit of refurbishing. The canteen and water supply aren't great, and there's only a girls' hostel, no boys' hostel available.

reviews.review_heading: Good course and curriculum, best campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available are all in good condition. Labs are top-notch. Canteen food is okayish, cold coffee is the best. Labs stay open as late as 9:00 PM depending on the workload. Basketball court is available. Hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Proud of my decision of choosing to come here.
reviews.review_text:
Provides Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, 3D printers, the highest technologies, library, hostels for girls only, play areas, etc. The faculty members also stay here till 7 p.m., so it’s usually good for asking doubts and seeking help.
Quality and cleanliness are really good here.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for Textile design.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is so good. Inside our college, we are inspired by many small things of the college. Our classrooms are very big and projectors connected. Very good quality hostels available. All types of references books available in our library. Canteen and food court are good to go. High-speed internet facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college teachers are very helpful and various facilities are available.

data.description: NIFT Delhi faculty is well-educated and goal-oriented. Each of them has a PhD in their area of specialisation and is helpful. They use powerpoint presentations to educate their students and are highly knowledgeable in their respective fields. They also include the pertinent books that ought to be used as references. Additionally, mentoring meetings are part of the weekly schedule. During these sessions, students are allocated a mentor who they may talk to about any problems they are having with their studies, their hostel or institution, or the entire location. Dr. Vandana Narang, Dr. Banhi Jha, Dr. Monika Gupta and Dr. Purva Khurana are some of the professors with a doctorate degree in their specialised fields.

college_info.intro:
NIFT Bangalore offers various courses to students at the UG and PG levels. The college offers BDes and MDes programmes to students as its flagship courses. These courses are offered for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. NIFT Bengaluru courses are offered in full-time mode and in several specialisations.
Some of the popular specialisations offered under the BDes programme are Fashion Communication, Accessory Design, Fashion Design, Knitwear Design, and Textile Design. Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of NIFT Bangalore. Below mentioned are some of the popular courses offered by National Institute of Fashion Technology Bengaluru:

As per the data sourced, the highest package and average package offered in the recent placements were INR 12 LPA and INR 8 LPA, respectively. Around 85% of the batch was placed during NIFT Bangalore placements. The list of recruiters included Titan, Flipkart, Amazon, and many others. review_content.Placements: The placements in college vary from year to year; usually, about 90% of students get placed, but it's not always through college placements. The course offers various understandings of various subjects like production marketing, management, merchandising, and much more. You get to learn the back end of the fashion industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is like any other hostel you'll find in college, although the infrastructure isn't very good and seems old. The rooms are kept clean and cleaned regularly as well. You have to share with 3 or four people, depending on what room you get. Obviously, it's a different experience when it comes to having fun with your friends.

review_summary.college_name: NIFT Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Knitwear Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nift is amazing I will teach not only in studies but also the quality of life

content.Placements: 90%students were placed. 9lakhs per annum is minimum highest can vary. Puma, Adidas and all were the top companies. 80% students get internship. This college will make you industry ready that will never let you get in trouble in the Industry. It just that people have to do little hard work here other than that everything is fine
content.Infrastructure: There are labs and costly machine wifi all over campus library. Mess and hostel is really good. Hostel room wifi is there in hostel. All the facilities are good you will get various things here and this campus will promote all the cultural activities. It feels amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Knitwear Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience in NIFT has opened my mind.

content.Placements: So people who choose the knitwear course in NIFT depend on the rank they've scored and their category, as there is a reserved category besides general. A lot of top recruiting companies come since it's India's top fashion college, like Puma, Nike, Adidas, and more. Almost 85% of students get recruited. The starting roles are mostly designers, as far as I've heard from Nift students I know.
content.Infrastructure: The college isn't very big; our auditorium is a little smaller compared to other branches, but our college is one of the top three NIFTs that have good placements, equipment, and faculty, which is a great advantage. I don't know much about the hostel, but as far as I've heard, the rooms are small, and you have to share with a roommate that they assign to you. There's a curfew at 9:30, and after the first year, you need to vacate.

individual_reviews.course: B.F.Tech. in Apparel Production - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best opportunity to enter the fashion industry is through college.

content.Placements: The placements in college vary from year to year; usually, about 90% of students get placed, but it's not always through college placements. The course offers various understandings of various subjects like production marketing, management, merchandising, and much more. You get to learn the back end of the fashion industry.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is like any other hostel you'll find in college, although the infrastructure isn't very good and seems old. The rooms are kept clean and cleaned regularly as well. You have to share with 3 or four people, depending on what room you get. Obviously, it's a different experience when it comes to having fun with your friends.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Fashion Management (MFM) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: NIFT Bangalore is an excellent institution.

content.Placements: In my Masters of Fashion Management MFM batch at NIFT Bangalore, about 85 percent students were successfully placed. The highest package offered was around 12 Lacs per annum, while the lowest was around 4 Lacs per annum with a package of around 7 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting firms include Titan, Fabindia, Fossil and HiDesign. About 70% of students got internships with companies like Tommy Hilfiger, Louis Vuitton and Michael Kors. Roles range from accessory designers to product developers and merchandisers.
content.Infrastructure: NIFT Bangalore offers excellent infrastructure for accessory design courses. The department has modern labs, spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with relevant resources. Wi-Fi connectivity has high-speed throughout the campus. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean accommodation and adequate facilities. Messes and canteens provide decent quality food and medical facilities are readily available on campus. Additional, sports and games facilities promote extracurricular activities and overall well-being.

admission_overview.college_name: NIFT Bangalore Admission 2025: Important Dates, Eligibility, Fees, Selection Process

paragraphs: NIFT Bangalore admission is entrance-based. The Institute offers BDes, BFTech, MFTech, MFM, Certificates, and MDes in the field ofFashion Technologyacross several specialisations. Apart from this,NIFT Bangalorealso offers various Continuing Education Programmes (CEP). Admission to the offered courses is based on merit in the NIFT Entrance Exam (except for certificate programmes).

National Institute of Fashion Technology offers courses to students at the UG and PG levels. Candidates seeking admission toNIFT Bangalorecan check out the most updated information related to theNIFT Bangalore course admissions 2025in the following highlights section:
NIFT Bangalore conducts admission on the basis of entrance exams. Check the table below to see the eligibility criteria of the courses:

NIFT Bangalore fee comprises several components. Students can pay the fee either annually or semester-wise. However, a few components are paid only once, such as the one-time fee. The students must pay the fee for the desired course at the time of admission. Check the fees for the courses in the table below:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

At NIFT Bangalore, students are offered seats based on merit secured by them in the relevant entrance exam. Applicants are required to pay the course fee to confirm the seat. The total seat intake of NIFT Bangalore differs according to the course and specialisation selected. Interested applicants can find belowNIFT Bangalore seat intakefor its courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

National Institute of Fashion Technology Bangalore allocates its seats for students in categories like Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, and OBC (Non-Creamy Layer). Check the table below to see the seat reservation at the college:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

For admission to various courses offered at NIFT Bangalore, candidates with a valid NIFT score that matches the cutoff for admission at NIFT Bangalore get a seat. Hence, for this flagship course, students must complete the NIFT application process and take the test. Further, theNIFT Bangalore admission processis explained below:

1: NIFT Bangalore Application Process 2025The NIFT Bangalore application process is carried out in online mode. For admission to any course offered at NIFT Bangalore candidates must apply for the NIFT Entrance test. Interested students can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired programme online by filling out the application form and paying the application fee.
2:Selection

Candidates shortlisted on merit in theNIFT entrance testand academic merit have to appear for a Personal Interview round or a Situation test, as per the programme selected. Further, a commutative score is calculated for final selections. For the other programmes, students who fulfil the minimum eligibility are shortlisted based on course-specific selection criteria.
3: Declaration of Final Merit List
After the results of all the round, the college will release the merit list according to the categories. Students who make it to the merit list become eligible for admission.
4: Admission ConfirmationThe selected candidates can further confirm their seats by paying the course admission fee.

faqs.question: Is it worth joining NIFT Bangalore?
faqs.answer: NIFT Bangalore is one of the top fashion institutes in India. The institute conducts placements drive. A placement schedule is released every year to confirm students regarding the placements drive. As per the verified Shiksha reviews, the highest and average package offered in the 2021 placements drive was INR 5 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively. Some of the top companies that recruit from this institute are Bata India Ltd., Decathlon, H&M, Nalli, etc. For updates regarding placements at NIFT Bangalore,click here. Moreover, candidates can also check out moreFashion Design Colleges in Bangalore.

faqs.question: Can I get into National Institute of Fashion Technology Bangalore Campus with 75% in class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes you can get into National Institute of Fashion Technology Banglore campus with 75% in class 12 for the Bachelors courses, you're eligible to sit for the entrance exam of NIFT after you clear the entrance then only you'll get admission in campus.

hostel.description: National Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore does not provide hostel facility for boys. Hostel accommodation is provided only during the first year of the course. 2nd, 3rd, and 4th-year girl students would be accommodated in hostel depending on the availability of rooms.  All the hostel are Wi-Fi enabled and have water purifier units, solar panels, housekeeping service and gym. Rooms are well ventilated and are available on triple sharing basis.

library.description: The Resource Centre (RC) at National Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore is considered as a repository of information for both students, faculty, and staff. RCs acquire print, electronic and other non-print learning resources throughout the year. Offers online information services to its members as it uses cloud-based integrated multi-location library management database e-Granthalaya of the National Informatics Centre (NIC). Resource Sharing has been one the key practices of RC, reading materials including books and periodicals in print are borrowed and photocopies /electronic copies of documents are arranged from other libraries through institutional memberships with other libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Nift is amazing I will teach not only in studies but also the quality of life
reviews.review_text: There are labs and costly machine wifi all over campus library. Mess and hostel is really good. Hostel room wifi is there in hostel. All the facilities are good you will get various things here and this campus will promote all the cultural activities. It feels amazing.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in NIFT has opened my mind.
reviews.review_text: The college isn't very big; our auditorium is a little smaller compared to other branches, but our college is one of the top three NIFTs that have good placements, equipment, and faculty, which is a great advantage. I don't know much about the hostel, but as far as I've heard, the rooms are small, and you have to share with a roommate that they assign to you. There's a curfew at 9:30, and after the first year, you need to vacate.

reviews.review_heading: The best opportunity to enter the fashion industry is through college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is like any other hostel you'll find in college, although the infrastructure isn't very good and seems old. The rooms are kept clean and cleaned regularly as well. You have to share with 3 or four people, depending on what room you get. Obviously, it's a different experience when it comes to having fun with your friends.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bachelors in Textile Design from the NIFT Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: NIFT Bangalore had a good infrastructure for textile design. There were proper labs with all types of necessary machines for the students hands-on practice. At the college, all kinds of facilities were available for the students. The college has developed labs, a library, a canteen, Wi-Fi, sports, medical, etc. facilities for the students. A hostel was also provided to the students. The food was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: NIFT Bangalore is an excellent institution.
reviews.review_text: NIFT Bangalore offers excellent infrastructure for accessory design courses. The department has modern labs, spacious classrooms and a well-equipped library with relevant resources. Wi-Fi connectivity has high-speed throughout the campus. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean accommodation and adequate facilities. Messes and canteens provide decent quality food and medical facilities are readily available on campus. Additional, sports and games facilities promote extracurricular activiti...

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-stocked library with a wide range of books, journals, and other study materials available for the students. There is Wi-Fi facility available for the students in classrooms as well as on the campus. There are various types of games available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The place where dreams get fulfilled.
reviews.review_text:
In the academic area, we have a classroom, library, lab, and seminar hall. In the hostel, we have single- and double-occupancy rooms. We have a common room where there is a TV and games.
We have a mess with vegetarian and non-vegetarian options available. We are also provided with a laundry facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average facilities. The Wi-Fi facility is not good. Classrooms are old. They provide sports and games facilities. A playground is not available in our college. The college should improve.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members who shape the industry.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi doesn't work most of the time. The infrastructure for the course is good. The library has a lot of useful research books and fashion magazines. There are many computer labs. The hostel is congested though. The room is supposed to be for 2 students but has 3 students in it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college needs genuine Improvement.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi hardly works, and when it does, the connectivity is so less. The classrooms are so less technically equipped. The tables always hurt students, they and have caused a lot of bruises and bleeding. The hostel facility does not provide what it promises, and the rooms require renovation. Mess food is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good and experienced faculty members with top-notch infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is right up there, with attractive visuals on every wall that catch the eye. The canteen food while is a little less on the quantity side, the quality side is off the charts. They have a cycle of meals, and on Fridays the current catering company offers a special meal, like ghee dosa, chappati, chicken, etc. The basketball court is my personal favorite part of the college along with this central amphitheater where most performances happen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has potential to improve.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered here are very rich and resourceful. The infrastructure is planned out very well and has been built to comprise a library, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, football table, carrom room as well as CAD labs. We also have material development machinery, appropriate equipment for various departmental specialities, well-maintained classes for lectures, and a mess for the students' nutritional needs. The mess doesn't offer a lot of variety or good quality food and ...

reviews.review_heading: The obstacles come to students' way very often, but they learn to overcome it.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel is good, security is tight, food is average, often spicy, but there is good thali available. The security is friendly, the warden checks in for attendance every day, and overall safety is guaranteed. The security is strict about timings.

reviews.review_heading: It is costly for nothing, but the faculty members are friendly.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is conjusted. There are no air-conditioners in classrooms and broken chairs. The hostel infrastructure is not that great, and we shared a 2 people room with 3. It charges Rs. 7,500 for each person for just a small corner with a bed, table, and half of the cupboard. Mess food is not healthy and tasteless too.

reviews.review_heading: One of the finest place to study fashion.
reviews.review_text: We have unlimited Wi-Fi in the campus. Hostel is only for girls. We have Mac labs and labs for pattern making and garment construction. Library is available for 6 days a week. Online library is there too. Food quality in the mess is average. We have basketball court, badminton court and other sports and games. There is a campus psychological counsellor visit to our campus twice a week.

data.description: The top level faculty members of NIFT Bangalore are around 50, whereas the students are around 1000 in numbers making it approximately 1:20 ratio of faculty members to students. The faculty members here are really determined, highly educated and specialised in their domains which in turn helps to build the strong foundation of those students studying. The admission list is also shortlisted on the basis of merit to enhance the growth of the college.

review_content.Placements: The in-house placements are not worth the fees we pay. A very small percentage of our seniors got good placements, or merely decent placements. review_summary.college_name: NIFT Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Knitwear Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty, good education, but the infrastructure and sourcing can be challenging.

content.Placements: The on-campus placements haven’t been that good lately, so most people apply for off-campus opportunities. During placements, priorities are given to the higher campuses. For example, Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore. Last time, they made a new rule where only 3/5 companies one can select to sit for the placement process, and in most of the cases, many companies backed out, and then students were left with a smaller number of companies to apply for.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. I personally feel they should have more machines. During juries, there is a lot of chaos as both the juniors and seniors need them. The college is in Navi Mumbai. It becomes very difficult to source materials as we have to travel to Mumbai. I wish the college was in Mumbai itself. We would have had more exposure. As for the hostel, it’s decent, but the only downside is the hostel food, which is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Textile Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: NIFT Mumbai in a nutshell.

content.Placements: The placement in NIFT is not extraordinary in terms of package, but there are good companies that participate in the process. For internships and job placement, big retail giants like Reliance, ABFRL, Tata Trent, and Dmart come in. About 60% of students get help from the college for the same.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by NIFT are good. The hostel rooms are spacious and well-equipped. Food, on the other hand, is average. The classrooms and labs are well-equipped and add to the experience of doing everything hands-on and not just relying on presentations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Textile Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall good experience, just not worth the fees we pay.

content.Placements: The in-house placements are not worth the fees we pay. A very small percentage of our seniors got good placements, or merely decent placements. Internships usually start after the 4th semester, but students are very active at NIFT; they find work outside the college themselves, which helps them in their portfolio.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent enough, the hostel facilities are good, but the food is okay-ish. The college has good Wi-Fi and water facilities. The classrooms are large enough, and the library is the best place in the entire campus; it is like a treasure for design students. The quality of food in the hostel mess fluctuates very frequently; else, it is fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Accessory Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good campus life but don't keep any fancy expectations, you'll be disappointed. Be open to learning.

content.Placements: NIFT Mumbai Accessories Design: 90%+ placements, salaries 3.5-13 LPA. Top recruiters: Titan, Amazon, Myntra, Hidesign, Flipkart, Godrej. Roles: Product Designer, UI/UX, Merchandiser, Creative Consultant. Internships at Fastrack, Tata, startups. Covers jewelry, smart wearables, and digital design. Many alumni become entrepreneurs.
content.Infrastructure: Girls hostel is very good, food is not the best but better than most hostels, college infrastructure is also very good. In both places, whatever complaints are made, they're taking action upon immediately. The resource centre aka library is very good and filled with super expensive and rare books, make use of it.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Fashion Management (MFM) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placement but the campus is small.

content.Placements: The average package is around 5-6 LPA, but the recruiters include top fashion companies such as Aditya Birla, Fabindia, and Decathlon. Most roles offered are for positions like merchandiser or buyer. While many students secure jobs through the college placement process, some also apply externally. The NIFT tag significantly enhances employability.
content.Infrastructure: The campus area is limited due to its location in Mumbai, but overall, the facilities are impressive. The library boasts an extensive collection, and students have access to WGSN and Promostyl. Each room has separate Wi-Fi, although the speed could be improved. Labs are equipped to meet all requirements for garment construction.

paragraphs: NIFT Mumbai admission processis a multi-step process. It is conducted online. Candidates should fulfil the eligibility before applying to any of the courses at NIFT Mumbai. The college offers admission based on entrance exam scores. Candidates can check below for theNIFT Mumbai Admission Process 2026:
Application Process
Students will have to complete an online application form provided on the official site of the institute and pay the application fee for submitting their application.
Selection Process

Those who submit their application will be then appearing for the NIFT Entrance exam 2026. The final selection will be based on the overall performance in all 3 rounds - Written Test(CAT/GAT), Situation Test, and Personal Interview. For few courses such as Diploma courses, the selection is done on the basis of merit secured by the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
Cutoff and Counselling

Students would be shortlisted on the basis of either academic merit or performance in the entrance test (whichever is applicable). After the NIFT selection rounds, the institute will release the cutoff of various courses, and those who score more than the cutoff are required to appear for the NIFT counselling.
NIFT Mumbai Admission Confirmation
To secure their seat at NIFT Mumbai, students would need to pay the admission fee.

NIFT Mumbai fee is made up of several components. Students can pay the fee either annually or semester-wise. However, a few components are paid only once, like the one-time fee. The students must pay the fee for the desired course at the time of admission.NIFT Mumbai tuition feevaries by the chosen course and specialisation.National Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai course feeis provided in the table below:

CampusTour

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, good education, but the infrastructure and sourcing can be challenging.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is good. I personally feel they should have more machines. During juries, there is a lot of chaos as both the juniors and seniors need them. The college is in Navi Mumbai. It becomes very difficult to source materials as we have to travel to Mumbai. I wish the college was in Mumbai itself. We would have had more exposure. As for the hostel, it’s decent, but the only downside is the hostel food, which is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: NIFT Mumbai in a nutshell.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by NIFT are good. The hostel rooms are spacious and well-equipped. Food, on the other hand, is average. The classrooms and labs are well-equipped and add to the experience of doing everything hands-on and not just relying on presentations.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good experience, just not worth the fees we pay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent enough, the hostel facilities are good, but the food is okay-ish. The college has good Wi-Fi and water facilities. The classrooms are large enough, and the library is the best place in the entire campus; it is like a treasure for design students. The quality of food in the hostel mess fluctuates very frequently; else, it is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life but don't keep any fancy expectations, you'll be disappointed. Be open to learning.
reviews.review_text: Girls hostel is very good, food is not the best but better than most hostels, college infrastructure is also very good. In both places, whatever complaints are made, they're taking action upon immediately. The resource centre aka library is very good and filled with super expensive and rare books, make use of it.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement but the campus is small.
reviews.review_text: The campus area is limited due to its location in Mumbai, but overall, the facilities are impressive. The library boasts an extensive collection, and students have access to WGSN and Promostyl. Each room has separate Wi-Fi, although the speed could be improved. Labs are equipped to meet all requirements for garment construction.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bachelors in fashion technology from the NIFT Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The college had good infrastructure and facilities for our course. In our course department, all the necessary facilities were available for the students. Various modern facilities for drafting and designing were available at the college. Sports, Wi-Fi, library and all other facilities were available for the better learning of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi-equipped classrooms, well-equipped labs, and an extensive resource center. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. The hostel has a recreation room, a court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology.
reviews.review_text: Course is very good with facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Lab coordinators are very good and helpful. Hostel for girls is very good and for boys is above average. Canteen food is very good, takes proper care of hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements but dissatisfied with the salary packages offered.
reviews.review_text: NIFT Mumbai has one of the best campuses among all the NIFTs. Every classroom has air-conditioners. The campus has Wi-Fi as well. Due to covid, college is not providing hostel and canteen facilities. You will find creativity in everything. It also has a basketball and badminton (outdoor) court.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the course, college and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: NIFT Mumbai campus has everything. Our college provides facilities like the best resource centre, Wi-Fi connection and new building have a centralised air-conditioner. The hostel facility is well-maintained, and the quality of the food served is excellent. Our college provides labs in our course like pattern making lab and garment construction lab. A testing lab is also available in other departments that we can use by taking permission. Different kind of machines is available here, which we use...

reviews.review_heading: It is not worth a course, because at last you will get the knowledge, but you will not get the job.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. You will get every facility on the campus. The hostel can accommodate about 450 students. The hostel has facilities like a TV room, library, study area, playing area, beauty parlour and gym. Quality of the food in the hostel is average, but the hostel fee is too high, according to the facility they provide you.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best fashion institute in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fairly lavish from the benchmarks of an administration foundation. You will be truly stunned by the etiquette and tidiness kept up in the grounds. Aside from that, we truly know how to party, be it any event, any social affair it can never go squandered.

reviews.review_heading: It was not at all good enough because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. Washrooms are very clean. Classrooms are well maintained. Moreover, the canteen also offers a variety of things which you can order and eat, but the quality of food served is obviously not that good as compared to the outside food stores. You can have fast food and a proper main course for having a good meal there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for real fashion world experience.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are available on our campus. As it's India's one of the top fashion college, we get exposure to the real fashion world. We have plenty of good lecturers and assistants, who are always available for students. Hostels are located nearby the college to save the time of students so that they can participate in other curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: 1460 strenuous yet totally worth it days of a so called 'adult'. .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good because the college provides us with a lot of labs and classrooms that are well maintained with up to date gadgets. The college also provides the kids with a grand resources centre, it is like an ocean of books right from current day fashion to art history, you name it and they have it.

The flagship programmes offered at Amity University Noida UP are BTech, MTech, and MBA. faqs.answer:
A:    The course duration of LL. M. in Amity Noida is one year. The fee structure for the LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is as follows:
* *General:* INR 1,64,000
* *Taxation:* INR 1,74,000
* *Intellectual Property Law:* INR 1,84,000
The fees for the LL. M. programme are inclusive of tuition fees, library fees, and examination fees. However, they do not include hostel fees, mess fees, or other incidental expenses. The fees for the LL. M. programme can be paid in two installments. The first installment is due at the time of admission and the second installment is due at the end of the first semester. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is a full-time programme and students are required to attend classes for a minimum of 12 hours per week. The programme also includes a research component and students are required to submit a dissertation at the end of the programme. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is a highly competitive programme and admission is based on merit. Students are required to have a minimum of 50% marks in their LL.B. Degree and they are also required to take an entrance exam. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida offers students the opportunity to specialize in a particular area of law and to gain advanced knowledge and skills in that area. The programme also prepares students for a career in law and for further studies in law. Here are some additional details about the fees structure for the LL. M. programme at Amity Noida:
* The fees for the LL. M. programme ar

review_content.Placements: Around 35% of students from our course get placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package offered is 8 LPA, reflecting strong technical roles. The lowest package is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Dell and Coforge, which hire students for technical support roles. Approximately 70 percent of students secure internships. faqs.answer: The course duration of LL. M. in Amity Noida is one year. The fee structure for the LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is as follows: * *General:* INR 1,64,000 * *Taxation:* INR 1,74,000 * *Intellectual Property Law:* INR 1,84,000 The fees for the LL. M. programme are inclusive of tuition fees, library fees, and examination fees. However, they do not include hostel fees, mess fees, or other incidental expenses. The fees for the LL. M. programme can be paid in two installments. The first installment is due at the time of admission and the second installment is due at the end of the first semester. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is a full-time programme and students are required to attend classes for a minimum of 12 hours per week. The programme also includes a research component and students are required to submit a dissertation at the end of the programme. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida is a highly competitive programme and admission is based on merit. Students are required to have a minimum of 50% marks in their LL.B. Degree and they are also required to take an entrance exam. The LL. M. programme at Amity Noida offers students the opportunity to specialize in a particular area of law and to gain advanced knowledge and skills in that area. The programme also prepares students for a career in law and for further studies in law. Here are some additional details about the fees structure for the LL. M. programme at Amity Noida: * The fees for the LL. M. programme are subject to change. * The fees for the LL. M. programme may be waived or reduced for students who qualify for financial assistance. * Students who are unable to pay the fees for the LL. M. programme may be eligible for a payment plan. If you are interested in applying for the LL. M. programme at Amity Noida, you can find more information on the college's website. The application process usually opens in the month of February.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Noida UP Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Clinical Psychology (Honours / Research) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the campus life, faculty, and services given by this university.

content.Placements: Placements are usually good at Amity University. Good recruiting companies come to our college for placements, and high packages are provided. In some cases, when the placements are not provided, the students can also find job opportunities outside also.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure is too good. For my course, the building is a little underdeveloped, but it is soon going to be developed as promised by the faculty. Food, medicine, and sports facilities are really good in this university. The hostel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Engineering at Amity University, Noida, is effective and it only has the fame.

content.Placements: I would like to say that approximately 75 percent of students got the placements. If they are well prepared with the skills required in current technology. There are lots of companies visiting the campus for placement. If you have good skills, you can get a placement easily. There are many roles, such as GET, Software Engineer, and sales, also.
content.Infrastructure: If I talk about Amity, the best thing that they are providing is the infrastructure, the campus is fully AC and fully Wi-Fi-enabled. They have a good number of labs for practicals in the Computer Science subject. They have a special AI lab which has been built in collaboration with NVIDIA. In my college, there are a number of canteens and cafeterias. From then on, the best one is the Mega Bite named canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and a good course curriculum.

content.Placements: Around 35% of students from our course get placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package offered is 8 LPA, reflecting strong technical roles. The lowest package is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Dell and Coforge, which hire students for technical support roles. Approximately 70 percent of students secure internships. The most common role offered is IT technician.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. It has properly equipped computer labs, and a well-stocked library that supports academic learning. Hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms. It also has decent mess and canteen food. Along with adequate medical support, and access to sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average opinion about the college.

content.Placements: Out of 11 students interested in placements, 3 have been successfully placed through campus placements. The highest package till now is 7.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course include BSES, Vanderlande, Schlumberger, Kirloskar Oil Engines, and LiuGong. 50 percent of students got internships through college support in companies like Dixon Technologies Ltd. and Nuremberg Ltd. Top roles offered include graduate engineer trainee and associate sales engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Labs are well-equipped with all the necessary infrastructure and machines. Classrooms are a bit messy. The library is well-equipped with good infrastructure and books. I found the mess quite hygienic, but the taste of the food is not up to the mark. Sports facilities and grounds are average, with nothing special.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great campus and teachers but dissatisfied with labs and placements.

content.Placements: The average package of 3 LPA can be expected. Only one company comes here that offers 8 LPA, but it takes 2 to 3 students only rest all are placed at the above mentioned package. The company comes, and you will give interview and sometimes they are online as well.
content.Infrastructure: Amity is best in terms of infrastructure, classrooms and library but lab in the pharmacy department definitely needs an upgrade. They are really good in other departments like biotechnology or chemistry, etc. The classroom teaching takes place with a projector and ppts are provided as notes. Hostels are available but the cost is very high and food is not included in the hostel fee and rooms are small as well.

admission_overview.description: Amity University Noida admissions are open now. The Amity Noida admissions are offered via both entrance and merit basis. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice. Amity University Noida MBA admission is based on a valid score of entrance exams such as CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ GMAT. For the remaining courses, admissions are based on the performance of candidates in the last qualifying exams. The university offers over 100 programmes under several streams, including Engineering, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, Design, Law and many more. Apart from the full-time programmes, the university also offers distance learning programmes via its Online and Distance Learning schools. Read the following article to get the details around the Amity University Noida admission criteria.

For entrance-based admissions, scores obtained in the accepted entrance tests are the criteria. paragraphs: Amity Noida admissionis a multi-step process. Candidates seeking for getting admission to UG/ PG courses of the university must go through a detailedAmity University Noida admission process. To admit the right candidates, the university selects students based on selection criteria, which include filling theAmity Noida application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and paying for theAmity University Noida feesat the time of final admission.
Interested in Amity University Noida course admissions? Check out the elaborated steps for theAmity University admission processin the following section:
Amity Noida Application Process

The Amity University admission process begins by filling an application form on the official website of Amity University Noida. If candidates wish to apply for more than one programme, they need to fill out a separate form for each course by paying an application fee ofINR 1,500each. The new users are required to generate login credentials and fill an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Amity Noida.
Amity Noida Selection Process

Amity Noida admissions are both merit and entrance-based depending on the course. Students need to meet clear both criteria to get admission. The selection criteria for Amity Noida programmes are as below:
Note: The personal interview can be either video-based or in person as per the university's directions.
Amity Noida Final Offer Letter

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the final result will be declared. The information concerning selection will be communicated on the admission microsite as well as via Email and SMS. Selected candidates will get an admission letter along with important information such as semester fee, class commencement date, time, venue of the course, allotment of a hostel (If applied), scholarship (If any) and the list of documents required at the time of joining. Candidates also have to pay for a certain amount as per theAmity University Noida fees structureto secure their seat.
lists: ForAmity University Noida UG admissions, students are selected based on merit in Class 12 followed by PI.

Amity University Noida PG course admissionsare also based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education in most cases. Further, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for thePersonal Interviewround, which is mandatory to qualify for admission to every course. Candidates have to qualify for exams such asCAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc for MBA admissions, while CUET-PG is also accepted for certain courses.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in Amity University, Noida after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Noida course admissions to most of its courses are based on the merit performance of candidates in their previous qualifying exams. There is no need to qualify for any particular entrance exams for courses from the streams of Humanities, Science, Commerce, management and Engineering such as BA, BCA, BBA, BA LLB, MCA, or BTech. Direct admission is offered to all of these courses. The admission process for direct admission is inclusive of the merit score and performance of candidates in the personal interview round.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Amity University Noida?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to Amity Noida must visit the website of the University to register themselves. The step-wise Amity University Noida admission process is given below:Amity University Application Process:Amity Noida's application process is the same for all courses and students can fill the form online from the official website. If candidates wish to apply for more than one programme, they need to fill a separate form for each course by paying an application fee ofINR 1,500each. If you are a new user, click on 'Apply Fresh' to register yourself. In case, you have already registered yourself, you can complete your application by clicking on 'Continue Partially Filled Form'.Availability of Information on the Admission Microsite:In the next step, aspirants can get access to the Amity University admission microsite to receive all kinds of admission-related updates. Candidates can log in to the admission microsite by using their form no and password.Selection Process:Amity Noida

faqs.question: Is Maths compulsory for BBA at Amity Noida?
faqs.answer: No, Maths is not compulsory for admission to Amity Noida. However, for BBA admission candidates must have secured Class 12 with 60% aggregate in English as the main subject and three other academic subjects (excluding second language, Physical Education, Fine Arts, Performing Arts or any other Vocational /Non-Written subjects). Candidates who passed this course requirements may apply online on the official website of Amity Noida for a three-year BBA course.

placement_data.title: Amity University Noida Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Amity University has released the placement details for its School of Engineering and Technology Class of 2025. The highest and average package offered to the Class of 2025 stood at INR 35.9 LPA and INR 9.6 LPA , respectively. The median package offered was INR 6 LPA . The students of the Engineering batch 2025 also received international offers from 3 companies. Some of the top recruiters of Amity University Noida in 2025 include Amazon, Paloalto, Google, Cisco, IBM, TCS, Samsung, Nokia, KPMG, Cognizant , etc.

faqs.question: Does Amity University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Amity University has released the placement details for its School of Engineering and Technology batch 2025. Over 110 companies visited the campus during the 2025 drive. The highest package was recorded at INR 35.9 LPA and the average salary stood at INR 9.6 LPA. Further, the median salary offered by companies was INR 6 LPA. Amity placements 2024-25 recorded 3 companies offering international placements.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during the recent Amity University placements?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the Engineering Class of 2025 during Amity University placements 2025 stood at INR 35.9 LPA. faqs.question: How is the Amity University Gurugram placement facility?
faqs.answer: Amity University Gurgaon has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. Amity University Gurgaon offers good placements annually for its various courses like BTech, M.Tech and MBA, etc. In 2024, 430 recruiters participated and offered various job roles to the batch 2024 across sectors, such as E­-Commerce, BFSI, Consulting, Research, etc. The key highlights of Amity University Gurgaon placements for the Class of 2024 and 2025 are given below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Placement Statistics (2025) Total recruiters 430 422 New recruiters visited 285 280 Repeat recruiters visited 145 142 Fortune companies participated 117 147 National companies participated 313 275 Popular recruiters Amazon, Capgemini, Coforge, etc. Amazon, IBM, Blackrock, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered to MBA students during the recent Amity University Gurgaon placements?
faqs.answer: The Amity University Gurgaon MBA average package offered during the 2023 placement drive is yet to be published on the official website. Once it is released, it will be updated on this page. However, the median package offered during Amity University Gurgaon MBA placements is disclosed in the Amity University Gurgaon Management NIRF report 2023. Check the below table to check the median packages offered during Amity Gurgaon MBA placements 2022: Course Median Package (2022) MBA INR 4.80 LPA Note : The median package mentioned above is taken from the Amity University Gurgaon Management NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for MBA at Amity University, Noida?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Noida offers good placement for its MBA course annually. A total of 202 recruiters visited the Amity Business School Campus in 2025. The highest and average package offered to the MBA Class of 2024 stood at INR 26.30 LPA and INR 7.35 LPA , respectively. The median package offered was INR 6.50 LPA .

The hostel fee may vary based on the accommodation type. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Sc at Amity University, Noida?
faqs.answer: Amity Noida BSc fee is cumulative of multiple components, which are one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. Some of these components are caution money, hostel fee, tuition fee, and more. The below table showcases Amity Noida BSc fee structure : Components Total Tuition Fee One-time fee INR 20,000 Tuition fee INR 1.6 lakh - INR 20.2 lakh Hostel fee INR 2.85 lakh - INR 4.65 lakh NOTE: The mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee of BA LLB in Amity University Noida?
faqs.answer: Amty Noida offers admission to BA LLB course in Non-Sponsored and Sponsored Categories. Amity Noida BA LLB tuition fee for all the five years of the course is INR 2.07 lakh. As per the unofficial courses, this amount is based on first year/ semester fee. Apart from this, candidates have to pay for the accomodation charges, separately. Additionally, one-time security deposit of INR 20,000 will also be paid at the time of admission.

highlights.description:
Amity University Noida has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national and international ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #37 in the Overall category, #22 under University, #37 under Engineering, #49 under Management, and #18 under Pharmacy by the NIRF 2025. Internationally, Amity University Noida is ranked #1001-1200 by the QS World 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. nirf.description:
Amity University Noida has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2024, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. Amity University Noida's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, Amity University Noida climbed 8 ranks to #49 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Overall', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Amity University Noida fell 94 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Amity University Noida climbed 3 ranks to #32 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Amity University Noida fell 116 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Amity University Noida has been ranked well by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Through the years, the Outlook rankings for Amity University Noida indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated stability in trend in the 'Science' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Amity University Noida's rank is #49, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'BCA' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, Amity University Noida's rank is #4, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less
