hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Noida UP Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the campus life, faculty, and services given by this university.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is too good. For my course, the building is a little underdeveloped, but it is soon going to be developed as promised by the faculty. Food, medicine, and sports facilities are really good in this university. The hostel is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amity School of Engineering and Technology, Amity University, NoidaReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Engineering at Amity University, Noida, is effective and it only has the fame.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about Amity, the best thing that they are providing is the infrastructure, the campus is fully AC and fully Wi-Fi-enabled. They have a good number of labs for practicals in the Computer Science subject. They have a special AI lab which has been built in collaboration with NVIDIA. In my college, there are a number of canteens and cafeterias. From then on, the best one is the Mega Bite named canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and a good course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. It has properly equipped computer labs, and a well-stocked library that supports academic learning. Hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms. It also has decent mess and canteen food. Along with adequate medical support, and access to sports facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amity School of Engineering and Technology, Amity University, NoidaReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average opinion about the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Labs are well-equipped with all the necessary infrastructure and machines. Classrooms are a bit messy. The library is well-equipped with good infrastructure and books. I found the mess quite hygienic, but the taste of the food is not up to the mark. Sports facilities and grounds are average, with nothing special.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and teachers but dissatisfied with labs and placements.
reviews.review_text: Amity is best in terms of infrastructure, classrooms and library but lab in the pharmacy department definitely needs an upgrade. They are really good in other departments like biotechnology or chemistry, etc. The classroom teaching takes place with a projector and ppts are provided as notes. Hostels are available but the cost is very high and food is not included in the hostel fee and rooms are small as well.

reviews.review_heading: My college's placement section must be improved.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, grounds, washrooms, etc. Facilities are very good according to the fees taken from students.

reviews.review_heading: Great teaching staff and student diversity.
reviews.review_text: Our department has 2 labs dedicated for agricultural research. The classrooms are big enough for 50-60 students. We have a big library in our university. We have Wi-Fi facilities seperate for both students and teachers. Hostels are of good quality and the food offered in the canteen is clean and tasty. We do have a medical block and the facilities are pretty average. We have a big sports ground with equipments for various sports and games, and the quality of these equipments are good.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty and labs, but average facilities and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms can definitely use an upgrade. Some of the chairs in our class are broken. The Wi-Fi does not work all the time. The fans and their switches are a little too messed up. The library is excellent infrastructure-wise, but there are barely any books from my syllabus. The labs are extremely well-maintained and ideal for research. The quality of food, however, could use improvement. Sports and games are all great. Medical facilities are also pretty good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amity School of Engineering and Technology, Amity University, NoidaReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is better than other colleges in Noida.
reviews.review_text: The students of Amity University like to share that my college is better than a private Institute. The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department were like Wi-Fi. Classroom labs, ground, washrooms, etc. They are very good according to the feedback taken from the student.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University, Noida life.
reviews.review_text: Almost every class has a Wi-Fi connection with a projector. The library is very big with books on all courses available with new editions by different scholars. There are a total of 5 meals with different foods and quantities. Overall quality of food is good. There is also a sports facility available, such as swimming, basketball, cricket, shooting, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Noida.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. 24/7 Wi-Fi facility, digital modern classrooms, and a library with thousands of books. The facilities of the hostel are also awesome. Mess and canteen food are tasty. Multiple sports complexes are present.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure facilities and friendly faculty members. Many opportunities and endless fun.
reviews.review_text: The buildings are top tier and they are maintained very well which is one of the things I love most about this college. They clean it everyday and they maintain it like a 5 star hotel. The Wi-Fi works average not that good but also not that bad. The classrooms are big and they are all fully furnished and cleaned everyday. The library is probably the gem of this college its so beautiful it has all the books needed and the seating is so perfect. There is a lift and an escalator too and there are s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amity Business School (ABS)
reviews.review_heading: Amity University Noida College review.
reviews.review_text: The campus has all the important academic buildings, a central library, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. Students can use residential facilities and dining halls. The hostel accommodation is considered satisfactory. The food in the mess is average. There is a health center with medical staff available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by RICS School of Built Environment, Amity University, NoidaReviewed on 12 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall the best College ever and highly recommendable.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure I have ever seen. The library is air conditioned. The library looks like it is a library in a hotel and classrooms. They are very nice and they have mess. They have 56 food outlets like Dominos and KFC. They have to know they have arcade. They have everything on their campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Amity School of Film and DramaReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not good for the placement of creative field students.
reviews.review_text: We have been provided with a library, labs, and a classroom. I have not taken a hostel as it feels more like living in Amity jail or something extreme. I wouldn’t recommend the hostel or the food. The arena isn’t good enough in Amity. They really provide Wi-Fi, but it sometimes does not work for students.

data.description: Amity University Noida faculty is highly qualified and experienced. The university has over diverse group of academicians, industry experts, and researchers. The faculty members have graudated from top universities across the world. Refer to the pointers below for major Amity University Noida faculty highlights:

qualifications: Post doctoral Experince in Abroad (CNRS labs, UPMC & UPSUD11, Paris, France) for 3 years
PhD (Fine Arts) in Visual Art; Short Course on Museum Studies (2005-2006) from Indian Museum, Kolkata; Master of Visual Arts in Painting; Bachelor of Visual Arts Painting;

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amity University, Noida

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Accenture, Knoldus, Shell, Capgemini, IBM, Oracle, Google, Amazon, Birlasoft, HCL, VMWare and Cognizant visit our college to hire students.
The placement cell of the college works really hard every year to provides all the students placements in good MNCs.
Wonderful internship opportunities are provided by Microsoft, SAP Bangalore, ZS Associates, Deloitte, Indian Air Force, Xoriant Solutions, Tech Table Creative Education, DXC, Capgemini, and Software.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The library is world-class with sufficient facilities for studying, and a lot of books are available.
In sports, the college provides a lot of facilities with a cricket ground, basketball court, swimming pool, squash area, shooting range, badminton area, lawn tennis area and many more.
Food quality is good and is provided not only in the college mess, but there are other outlets like subway, dominoes, cafe coffee day, etc., available.
The hostel provides basic facilities like a bed, storage space, a study table, a  chair, and a bathroom.
It has a huge campus with fully air conditioned classrooms, library and the labs are fully equipped.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teachers are also very helpful and approachable, Also, we are required to make research papers every semester, (apart from the assignments and self-works)which enhances our knowledge.
As if we talk about the teachers and other staff members of the university, all are very helpful, well-qualified, and well-knowledgeable in their respective subject.
They offer good notes, and they assign different interesting tasks for students to get a good exposure, Both traditional and smart teaching methods are used to teach.
The course curriculum is relevant and includes all things which students need in professional career growth, and it makes students industry-ready.

Faculty.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: I chose this course because I have a keen interest in the latest technologies, and I want to become a software engineer in the future.
The fee of our college is expensive, However, apart from studies, if you want opportunities and the crowd, then this is the best college in terms of that.
Our college organises a lot of fests, the Amity youth festival, and many events months.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Fashion Management (MFM) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of MFM course from NIFT, Chennai.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students had to find internships and job opportunities themselves. The college does not actively work towards finding a good opportunity for growth and practical learning for the students. The highest average package offered was 6.5 LPA. Most of the companies come for merchandising roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course is very basic. It is something you can learn on the job. This course does not provide us with as much knowledge. The use of facilities is very weak and the teams are not well versed and up-to-date. They charge extra to give you the degree, even after having paid a hefty fee.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A college that has a great amount of talent and creativity .

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is between 60 and 70 percent. The highest package goes up to INR 600000 per year, and the lowest is around INR 200000 per year. The top recruiting companies are local business houses in Chennai itself. 80 percent of students got internships. The top roles offered in the course are associate designer, assistant designer, and fashion stylist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus as such is great. The design itself is super cool, and the facilities provided are great, like air conditioning in all labs. The Wi-Fi is decently good, and the library is packed with great books. The hostel is one of its best parts. It is amazing, super clean, and the food provided is not up to the mark, but it is still manageable, and it is really safe too; there is a nurse available 24/7. We also have a basketball court, a football field, a gym, and an indoor badminton court.

review_summary.college_name: NIFT Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Fashion Management (MFM) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements at the campus are satisfactory, but compared to other campuses, they tend to fall slightly behind. In our course, only a limited number of students could secure job placements. The highest package offered was 700000. Some of the top recruiting companies were Birla Group and Titan.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are pretty decent and they give wgsn access to students with average food from canteens and sports and games areas for both colleges and hostels. Classrooms and the entire campus are well structured, providing a light and comfortable environment for smooth learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Knitwear Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bachelor of design in knitwear from the NIFT Chennai.

content.Placements: At the NIFT Chennai, around 40–45% of the students get placements in our course. In our course, the average package offered was between 3 and 7 LPA. Various design and product design companies visits college for placements. top roles offered were fashion designer, product designer, brand designer, etc. Students also get internship opportunities at this college.
content.Infrastructure: NIFT Chennai has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. Our college has all the necessary facilities for students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, etc. were available for the students of the college. The college had pretty beautiful campus. Hostel facility were also given to the students. All the equipment was available for the students learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.FTech. in Apparel Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Around 3 seniors from our college got placement for 25 LPA recently. That means B.FTech specifically has good placements at NIFT. Some of the other department seniors got placed at good companies in Noida and Delhi. Internships in our college are also great, and they are according to your grades and skills. Try gaining extra skills too.
content.Infrastructure: I love our hostel, it's perfectly maintained and has great food with transportation as well. The staff are caring and the wardens are also very responsible. The campus is also very well maintained, and everything is very aesthetic. You can look at your college from a different angle every day.

AS per the NIFT's official website, the written tests for the NIFT 2024 exam will be held tentatively in the 1st week of February 2024. The written tests comprise a General Ability Test (GAT) and a Creative Ability Test (CAT). GAT is mandatory for all candidates, but CAT is only required for B. Des and M. Note that scores of the written exams will be used to shortlist candidates for a Situation Test/ Personal Interview.

paragraphs: Students must appear for the NIFT entrance exam to get a seat in the desired programme. The admission process involves application form, entrance test, result declaration, counselling and seat allotment. Interested students can follow theNIFT Chennaiadmission processexplained below:
Application Process
Students who fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria can fill the application form through theofficial site.
Appear for the Entrance Exam

The students have to appear for theNIFT Entrance Exam. This entrance test is conducted in two parts: written exams and situation tests/ personal interviews. Moreover, the written exam is conducted in online mode. The situation test is in offline mode. The personal interview is in online mode.
Release of Cutoff List
After the selection rounds, the institute releases the cutoff list. TheNIFT Chennai cutoffmarks vary from one course to another.
NIFT Counselling

Students with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks become eligible for counselling. During counselling, a seat allotment procedure is carried out. The complete schedule is available on the official website.
Document Verification & Payment ofFees
After seat allotment, students have to submit the important documents at the institute. Along with this, students are asked to pay some amount of fees for seat confirmation.
Download NIFT Chennai Brochure

Thetuition feeis inclusive of several components. Some components are to be paid only once and the remaining are charged semester-wise/ annually. The students must pay the fee at the time of admission.NIFT Chennai feesis different depending on programme/ specialisation selected by the students. courses_data.name: NIFT Chennai BFTech Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: NIFT Chennai BFTech admissionis entrance-based. The institute offers the course at the UG level for a duratiion of four years. The basic eligibility is to complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics from a recognised board. Selection is based on NIFT Entrance Exam/ GAT+ PI + Counselling. Check below the key highlights for NIFT Chennai BFTech admission:

faqs.question: Is BFTech admission at NIFT Chennai entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Yes,NIFT Chennai BFTech admissionis entirelyentrance-based. Students seeking to get into the course are required to qualify the admission criteria set by the institute. Students are shortlisted based on the score secured by them in the NIFT Entrance Exam General Ability Test (GAT) section. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or its equivalent with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics from a recognised board are eligible to apply for the course. Interested students can visit the official website of

faqs.question: Does NIFT Chennai offer lateral entry for BFTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIFT Chennai does offer lateral entry for BFTech programme. The institute provides the course in Apparel Production and it costs aboutINR 9 Lacsfor lateral admission. Students must appear and clear theNIFT Lateral Entry Admissiontest (NLEA) to be eligible for admission. Those fulfiling the admission criteria can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the programme by registering online.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Ftech at National Institute of Fashion Technology Chennai?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Chennai accepts the General Ability Test (GAT) for admission to its B.F. Tech program. NIFT also accepts CAT scores for admission to its B. Des program.To be eligible for B.F. Tech, candidates must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as a main subject from a recognised institute. The qualifying age is 24 years as on August 1 of the year of admission. For candidates of Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribe/ Persons With Disabilities

courses_data.name: NIFT Chennai MFM Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: At NIFT Chennai, students can pursue a two-year PG course inMaster of Fashion Management. Admission toMFM at NIFTis done through the entrance exam conducted by the institute. For admission to this course, students need to qualify NIFT entrance exam comprises a General Ability Test (GAT) written exam. The final selection is based on the candidate’s performance in the situation test comprises Group Discussion and Personal Interview round. Check below theNIFT Chennai MFM admission:

faqs.question: What are the various courses offered by NIFT Chennai?
faqs.answer: NIFT Chennai offers several courses in the field of Fashion Technology. These programmes are offered in full-time and regular mode across several specialisations. Students can pursue an undergraduate degree inBDesandBFTech. At the postgraduate level, students are offeredMFMandMFTechcourses. Interested students can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired course by completing the application procedure.

faqs.question: How can I join NIFT Chennai?
faqs.answer: To join NIFT Chennai, candidates need to appear for the Creative Ability Test and the General Ability Test.Candidates who manage to clear the entrance tests will be called for a GD and PI round.Candidates who perform well in these rounds will be alloted seats in their preferred courses offered by NIFT Chennai.

faqs.question: Which is the entrance exam for BDes in NIFT Chennai?
faqs.answer: Admission to BDes at NIFT Chennai is solely entrance-based i.e. - The National Institute of Technology (NIFT), which will beconducting the writtenexams for NIFT 2024 tentativelyin the 1st week of February 2024. For aspiring candidates, it’s mandatory to qualify for the written exam along with the situation test comprising different rounds. NIFT Chennai selects students based on the weightage of different parameters in each selection round. Additionally, the seat allocation is respectively common for all the reserved categories and the total seat intake is equally divided into each specialisation.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are pretty decent and they give wgsn access to students with average food from canteens and sports and games areas for both colleges and hostels. Classrooms and the entire campus are well structured, providing a light and comfortable environment for smooth learning.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bachelor of design in knitwear from the NIFT Chennai.
reviews.review_text: NIFT Chennai has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. Our college has all the necessary facilities for students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, etc. were available for the students of the college. The college had pretty beautiful campus. Hostel facility were also given to the students. All the equipment was available for the students learning.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MFM course from NIFT, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is very basic. It is something you can learn on the job. This course does not provide us with as much knowledge. The use of facilities is very weak and the teams are not well versed and up-to-date. They charge extra to give you the degree, even after having paid a hefty fee.

reviews.review_heading: A college that has a great amount of talent and creativity .
reviews.review_text:
The campus as such is great. The design itself is super cool, and the facilities provided are great, like air conditioning in all labs. The Wi-Fi is decently good, and the library is packed with great books.
The hostel is one of its best parts. It is amazing, super clean, and the food provided is not up to the mark, but it is still manageable, and it is really safe too; there is a nurse available 24/7. We also have a basketball court, a football field, a gym, and an indoor badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: I love our hostel, it's perfectly maintained and has great food with transportation as well. The staff are caring and the wardens are also very responsible. The campus is also very well maintained, and everything is very aesthetic. You can look at your college from a different angle every day.

reviews.review_heading: The pros and cons of NIFT Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The building's structure is really beautiful, campus is small and cosy. The new girls' hostel is nice. The old hostel within the campus is pretty bad. Labs are nicely equipped. Hostel food is nutritional but tasteless. North Indians might not like the food. Nonveg is scarce. Washrooms are not very nicely maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and facilities, okay faculty members, placements are also okay.
reviews.review_text: The national institute of fashion technology in Chennai is equipped with great infrastructure. There is campus Wi-Fi available throughout, a big auditorium, around two food stalls in addition to the campus canteen. There is also an in campus stationery store and printing shop which is really convenient for assignments. There is a volleyball court and a tennis court. The classrooms are spacious although unbearable in the summer months as they do not have AC. The pattern making, GC and computer la...

reviews.review_heading: I was quite satisfied with my college environment facilities, faculty members were nice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good spacious for practical works as well as for lecture classes. Library with Wi-Fi, A/C was big for study, research work. Wi-Fi was available from morning 11:00 am till 9:00 pm night. Medical Facilities were not available but during 4 years of course, each year we used to get Medical Insurance ID cards through college facility which we can use for check ups and treatments. Sports "Converge" used to be held during winter vacations. Canteen facilities were good enough to attract ...

reviews.review_heading: Best learning with best environment.
reviews.review_text: NIFT is already a brand and their is no question on the quality of infrastructure, classroom, workplaces, library, medical facilities. I was the hostler their throughout the course means 4 years I spend there and I never felt like to stay out of the campus because the rooms, the food they provide is worth it.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college, everybody is helpful. Just go for it if you want success.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice infrastructure, good curriculum, and best design of the building. There are two buildings, one annexe building and the main building. The college has a positive environment, as told one of the top colleges in India holding the best rank. If you want to know more, just google it, you will get all the news related to it.

reviews.review_heading: An outstanding campus architecture and exciting college crowd as well as diverse atmosphere.
reviews.review_text:
The NIFT, Chennai campus is one of the unique campuses in India. It is inspired by a Rubik's cube. The campus walls stand out of the concrete jungle surrounding, with its colourful outlay and angular architecture. 
Apart from that, the campus is equipped with Wi-Fi (free) as well as a resource centre with the latest fashion magazines, books and materials for studying. Although the labs aren't that equipped, as compared to other campuses the labs are workable. The classrooms have full CCTV cover ...

reviews.review_heading: A different experience filled with enjoyment with the locals and made a lot of friends.
reviews.review_text: It has a unique infrastructure. As it is a designing and creative field, every campus has there own design and AC classes as well. I am from NIFT Chennai where AC is a must, and it also has a playground. They used to organise indoor and outdoor competitions in all the NIFT campus' of India.

reviews.review_heading: NIFT Chennai is the best and it will always be.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is a Wi-Fi zone. There are many computer labs and one MAC lab. A sports ground is also available on the campus for volleyball. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped with world-class facilities on fashion designing. The canteen is nice but a north Indian will not get the taste as it tastes like south Indian food but the other cafeterias are pretty good. There are separate girls and boys hostels. The girls' hostel has AC which you may take.

NIFT, Chennai one of the best centers to do your fashion degree as the standard of education they offer is enhanced by experienced professors from the design and garment industries. Infrastructure is brilliance but needs more attention on personal facilities. Chennai being a metro is again one of the reasons you should pursue your education here as you will come in touch with various cultural and social events in the city which in turn help you knowing about the various cultural, artistic value ... paragraphs: The fees for BDes at NIFT Chennai is around INR 6.1lakh - INR 12.3 lakh. The mentioned fee is only the tuition fee. The BDes fee aslo includes other one time fees, which candidates have to pay during admission. Also there is the NIFT entrance exam fee i.e. NIFT 2024 application fee is INR 3000. The fee is sourced from various source. Hence, its indicative.
B.FTech course at the National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Chennai costs INR 12.77 lakh. The course is four years long and is offered full-time.

Admission to BDes at NIFT Chennai is solely entrance-based. Candidate have to fill the online application form of The National Institute of Technology (NIFT). The NIFT 2024 application fee for the OPEN category is INR 3,000. However, SC, ST, and PwD candidates need to pay only INR 1,500. Once the application form is filled, candidates have to submit the form along with the application fee.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIFT Hyderabad offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and continuing education (CE) programmes in the stream of Fashion and Design. At the UG level, the available courses are Fashion Communication, Knitwear Design, Textile Design, B.FTech., and others. At the PG level, the available courses are Masters of Fashion Management (M.F.M.). The college also provides Continuing Education programmes and Bridge programmes to students. individual_reviews.title: Short review of NIFT Hyderabad.

content.Placements: The average package of the institute is 3 to 6 LPA, and the highest package as of now is 18 LPA. Students also get internships. Companies that come for placements include Raymond, Siyaram, and Aditya Birla. Along with opportunities from alumni and graduate students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very poor and small. Wi-Fi quality could be better. There is only a girls’ hostel, no boys’ hostel. The hostel food is okay and hygienic, but the toilets are in very poor condition. The course is good and includes many extracurricular activities.

Around 80% to 90% of students get job offers in our college. Internships are provided in our college.

paragraphs: The admission process for NIFT Hyderabad 2026 is entranced based. Aspirants have to pass the test followed by selection rounds. Aspirants can check below the steps to get a seat in NIFT Hyderabad:
1: NIFT Hyderabad Application Process 2026
Candidates need to fill out the NIFT application form available on the website of NIFT. Aspirants need to pay INR 2,000 (INR 500 for SC/ ST/ PwD category) as application fees.
2: Selection Process

Candidates need to appear for NIFT entrance exam (CAT and GAT) for admission to BDes and MFM programmes. Aspirants need to only appear for GAT for BFTech programme. Selected candidates are called for Situation Test for UG courses. For MFM, aspirants need to pass a personal interview round.
3: Admission Confirmation

Candidates who have successfully cleared the selection process are granted admission to NIFT Hyderabad. Aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification. Candidates also need to pay theNIFT Hyderabad fees to confirm their seat.

The fee structure for different courses at the NIFT Hyderabad varies with the specialisation with which they are offered. The seat reservations are as per the government rules. The following table mentions all the popularNIFT Hyderabad coursesalong with their total tuition fee:

hostel.description: NIFT, Hyderabad hostel rooms are well equipped with the bed, study table, chair, almirah, etc. It has a visitor’s room, medical room and 24 hours hot-water facilities.The hostel has internet room with Wi-Fi Connectivity and indoor games.

library.description:
NIFT, Hyderabad library is well equipped with modern facilities and resources in the form of DVD / CD-ROMs, online databases, micro films, slides, audio-video cassettes, designer garments, materials, accessories, books, journals and project reports etc.The resource centre uses Alice for Windows (AfW), which is an integrated library management system that supports all in-house operations of the library. The AfW has modules on acquisition, cataloging, circulation, serials, article indexing and OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue). The bibliographic information (i.e., Title, Author, Subject, key words etc.) of all the resources available in the centre can be accessed through OPAC in intranet. The resource centre has implemented bar-code based computerized circulation system.
The library has following four rooms:
Book Stack Area
Reading Hall
Circulation counter and Technical processing section
Materials wing

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Basketball court, Volleyball court, Tennis court, Badminton court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: Short review of NIFT Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very poor and small. Wi-Fi quality could be better. There is only a girls’ hostel, no boys’ hostel. The hostel food is okay and hygienic, but the toilets are in very poor condition. The course is good and includes many extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and studios are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. There is an auditorium with 350 seats, a spacious resource center, a college counsellor, a stationary, a gym, a cafeteria, and indoor and outdoor sports facilities. Canteen and mess serve 4 times delicious meals including breakfast, lunch, tea, and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty, but hostels could get a little better.
reviews.review_text: There are better hostels on other main campuses like Gandhinagar, Bangalore, and Delhi. The Hyderabad campus is also good. It's the third-largest campus of all. The mess facilities have been getting better over a period of time. Sports are also taken care of.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure, faculty, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is really good and spacious. We are provided with lots of activities and facilities, such as pool tables, table tennis, volleyball, basketball, etc. Our college has a good dance team for all the dance enthusiasts. The cultural team organises a lot of events and trips throughout the year for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, many amenities, well maintained hostels, classes and labs .
reviews.review_text: The classes are well built and air conditioned. There are a few amenities for students to pass time during their break, for instance a pool table and a TT table. The labs are well maintained and have everything you could possibly need for assignments. The hostels are well maintained and are in a twin-sharing system. The Hyderabad campus also provides a guest house facility for parents to stay in when they drop their children to college. The cost for that is 900 rs per night. The washrooms can us...

reviews.review_heading: It has the best infrastructure and the best faculty members across India.
reviews.review_text: It has the best canteen across all NIFT campuses in Hyderabad. The library which is called the Resource Center is also top-notch in the Hyderabad campus. We have plenty of labs, and NIFT provides a good amount of resources. Every year NIFT organises an inter-college sports competition called converge which is very helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am completely satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for this course in NIFT Hyderabad is outstanding. You get everything which you want for the course like every lab for practical, Wi-Fi connectivity on the entire campus and a library with all books you need. Classrooms are perfectly designed, and there is an auditorium and a playground. Everything is available here. There's no hostel for boys, but for girls, there's a hostel, which is well designed. The food served in the girls' hostel is like homemade food. Emergency...

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with our course and college. Faculty members and their teaching skills are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure, along with the best facilities. There are a peaceful environment and greenery which helps you to do your works, but the hostel rooms and food are very average. I would suggest our college to make a lot of improvements like should improve food quality, maintain neatness, cleanliness and renovate washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the labs are fully equipped with all the materials required for our day to day working. The college and even the hostel is under strict protection. Facilities provided are good, and I feel it is one of the best colleges.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in India.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were good on campus. We had fully equipped makeup studios with an occupancy of 50 persons and pattern making lab. We had a well-furnished lab with pattern making tables. There were 60 male/female body forms and 4 steam irons. Garment construction lab and 67 industrial sewing machines were also provided to students. There were well-furnished computer labs with 75 desktops. We also had a Chroma Studio.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure, including computer labs, classrooms, a library, etc. The quality of food served in the canteen is poor. Medical facilities are good. So are the sports and games facility on the campus. We have basketball, football and volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: Learning is very much fun here, and there is lots of space for creativity. Placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are average, but the infrastructure is very good. The library is huge and great, and the speed of the Wi-Fi facility is really fast. Every kind of lab is available here like studios, printing lab, GC lab, computer labs, 3D lab, etc. Classrooms are also good. Faculty members of the hostel are very good, supportive and very knowledgeable. The food served here is just average, and we are planning to make a club for food and everything. So that students can handle...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement rate, good infrastructure, and satisfactory faculty, but college fees bit higher.
reviews.review_text: The college provides 24 hours of working Wi-Fi. There is a 4-sections separated library which is known as the resource center. The latest promo styles for design predictions are available, along with fabric and material samples. There are fully equipped labs for every department. There are spacious classrooms. The campus environment is eco-friendly. The building is decorated with artworks of students. There is easy access to administrative offices. There are 2 girls hostels with 2 sharing rooms ...

reviews.review_heading: It's a decent college if you want to get a degree in textile design.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. They have labs apart from the garment construction labs which we have to share with the other departments. Rest all other labs are well-equipped. We have a dyeing and printing lab where we can do almost all sorts of printing and most dyes. We need to inform them before about the colours that are required according to our designs. There is a weaving lab which apparently has some Swiss and some Indian looms which are to be manually operated for weaving, a...

reviews.review_heading: We are proud to be dynamic and motivated students as we are mentored and supported well.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is situated in between the IT hub and the statecraft village, Shilparamam. NIFT Hyderabad has one of the best infrastructures and is also an ISO certified campus. We have a very good resource centre where you can find some magazines and all the books related to management, technology, designing, etc. We can actually research a lot from our library. The college also has a good auditorium, conference hall, and a number of laboratories for each department separately. The campus also has ...

college_info.intro: NIFT Gandhinagar offers BDes and BFTech programmes at the UG level and MFM and MFTech at the PG level. The duration of UG programmes offered by NIFT Gandhinagar is four years. However, the duration of PG courses is two years. The institute also offers some general electives with every programme with enhanced creative potential and flexibility. Apart from UG and PG programmes, the institute also offers Continuing Education (CE) programmes duration of which range from six months to one year. Some of the popular NIFT Gandhinagar courses are mentioned in the table below, along with their specialisations and fee details:

faqs.answer: A:    NIFT Gandhinagar has a broad relationship with leading recruiters in the fashion and design industries. Fabindia, Tanishq, Bata, Liberty, H&M, Zara, Marks & Spencer, Myntra, Amazon Fashion, Nykaa Fashion, and Raymond are among the top recruiters. These businesses frequently only hire a small number of students, and the remaining students are usually on their own to find employment. Many students launch multiple startups, which their institution assists them in learning about.Remember that
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: A:    Employment in NIFT Gandhinagar's Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programme varies somewhat. According to available information, the average salary package for B.Des in 2023 was about 3 LPA-4 LPA and the employment rate in 2022 was about 82%. However, there are indications that employment has not been very good in the last couple of years due to market conditions. Top companies like Tanishq, Lifestyle, Naukri.com, Godrej, Nike, Spyker, Shopper Stop, and H&M are hiring in NIFT Gandhinagar. The hi
faqs.question: How are B.Des placements at NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: A:    NIFT Gandhinagar's placement percentage is lower than that of NIFT Chennai. However, NIFT Gandhinagar has made notable progress in recent years, and the difference has shrunk. High placement rates frequently above 90% are a feature of both educational institutions. In 2023, the most expensive package offered by NIFT Gandhinagar was about 12 LPA, while the most expensive package offered at NIFT Chennai was almost 22 LPA.Across various NIFT programmes, such as Fashion Design, Textile Design,
faqs.question: Does NIFT Gandhinagar offer better placements than National Institute of Fashion Technology, Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    Since, NIFT conducts a centralised placement drive across all NIFT campuses, the institute has not released an exclusive placement report 2023. However, the following points might help students in order to prepare for NIFT placement drive:Students need to get engaged with various workshops and interactions involving internal and external expertsCommunicate with alumni and industry leadersClassroom projectsIndustry visitExposure to exhibitions and fairsInternshipsPractical knowledge on vari
faqs.question: How to prepare for NIFT Gandhinagar placement drive?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates can check the NIFT Gandhinagar courses and fees 2025 details in this space:

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Gandhinagar total tuition fee for the BFTech course ranges between INR 6.1 lakh-INR 12.3 lakh. Apart from the total tuition fee, a one-time payment of INR 27,200 (refundable) will be also charged at the time of admission. For a detailed NIFT Gandhinagar BFTech fee structure, click here. This fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BFTech at NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: A:    A 70% in class 12 is not a guarantee, but it is a possibility to get into NIFT Gandhinagar. To be admitted, one must pass the NIFT entrance exam. Even with a little lower class 12th %, a strong score can greatly increase your prospects. To be competitive, aim for a score in the top 20–30 percentile. The cutoff scores for the various B.Des programmes that NIFT Gandhinagar offers are different.Certain programmes may have higher competition than others, such as Fashion Design.Apart from entrance exam and class 12 marks, NIFT Gandhinagar also considers factors like work experience, portfolio presentation and personal interview performance during the selection process. 70% in 12th is a good base but to get a seat at NIFT Gandhinagar you have to clear the entrance exam and other selection criteria.
faqs.question: Can I get into NIFT Gandhinagar with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MDes course at NIFT Gandhinagar, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are entrance-based (NIFT + PI + Counselling) and candidates must pass graduation from any recognised state/national board. Candidates who have not completed graduation are not eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to M.Des at NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Fashion Technology offers BDes and BFTech courses at the undergraduate level. It offers M.De:s, MFTech and MFM courses at the postgraduate level. Students can check the table below to know course-wise selection criteria:Course NameSelection CriteriaBDesNIFT + PI + CounsellingMDesNIFT + PI + CounsellingBFTechNIFT + PI + CounsellingMFTechNIFT + PI + CounsellingMFMNIFT + PI + Counselling

review_content.Placements: Since it is a new course that started in 2021, campus placements are not provided. First batch of students took part in a research dissertation project in their final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is satisfactory but the buildings need some renovation. Hostel rooms are good with double occupancy including two beds with no mattresses, tables, racks, and mirrored almirahs. There is an extra space above the almirahs for storing additional items.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable, well-qualified, and experienced. They interact with every student. The course curriculum is helpful in multiple disciplines and is an ideal option for students interested in research-oriented careers in any field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Design (M.Des.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, with decent future prospects.

review_content.Placements: We are the second batch here at NIFT Gandhinagar, in M.Des programme. This is a research based course. So, they teach you systems thinking, problem solving thinking and design thinking methods. 4 main specifications in M.Des are curation, social design, UI UX, and strategy management design.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available. It is a bit small campus, compared to other new campuses. Hostel facility is available only for girls of first year. Food is good here. Doctors are available. Sports facilities are available.
review_content.Faculty: Four main depending specialisations are curation, design for society, ui UX, and strategic manage design. This M.Des programme is research based, and not product centred. It makes the students industry ready. The work we do here is good. 3 assignments, and final jury are conducted.

faqs.answer: To get admission in NIFT Gandhinagar, candidates need to apply online through the official website of NIFT. However, admissions are based on a valid score obtained in NIFT entrance exam.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission to NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: NIFT is a national-level design entrance exam conducted by the National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT).The exam is conducted once every year and has TWO parts:Written Exams - It comprise the GAT and CAT. The GAT paper is mandatory for all programs, while only B.Des and M.Des candidates need to take the CAT. Situation Test/ Personal Interview - B.Des candidates who get shortlisted have to appear in the Situation Test, whereas PG candidates need to appear in a Personal Interview. The only exception is B.F.Tech program, where the admission merit list will be prepared solely based on GAT scores. The FINAL score of NIFT 2025 for the other programs will be prepared by giving weightage to the written exams and Situation Test/ Personal Interview.
faqs.question: Q: Is it tough to get admission to NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: To get into NIFT Gandhinagar for a MDes course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. NIFT Gandhinagar offers full-time MDes courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on NIFT + PI + Counsellinge. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass graduation (common eligibility).
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission to M.Des at NIFT Gandhinagar?

faqs.answer: NIFT Gandhinagar admissions are currently open for various courses. Candidates are selected for courses based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the NIFT. The applications are open for various courses at the UG and PG level. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions to various courses open at NIFT Gandhinagar?

review_summary.college_name: NIFT Gandhinagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.F. Tech in Apparel Production - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good faculty. The campus is also the best.

content.Placements: Almost 95% of placements are guaranteed. Companies like Aditya Birla, Myntra, and other comes for recruitment. Seniors said that there are many good opportunities after NIFT. Though it's my first year, I am happy with my decision. I am sure that this college will lead to a good future.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The campus is very big and nice. There are huge classrooms and labs. Over-timings of labs are scheduled for students. The hostel has good facilities. The mess provides good food. Good rooms are there in the hostel with good security.

individual_reviews.course: B.F. Tech in Apparel Production - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: NIFT Gandhinagar overview.

content.Placements: The average package is around 6 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Around 50% of students get placed. Top recruiting companies are ABFRL, Arvind, Nykaa, and First Cry. Almost everyone gets an internship as it is mandatory. The top roles offered for our course are Consultant, Merchandiser, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, IT labs, PM labs, and sewing labs. The classrooms are well-equipped with AC and smart boards. The hostel is available only for first-year female students, and you can have food from the mess, but they charge for that. You’ll have to pay for one semester. The food is average, and medical facilities are available for students. Sports activities are also offered.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Design (M.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology.

content.Placements: Since it is a new course that started in 2021, campus placements are not provided. First batch of students took part in a research dissertation project in their final year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is satisfactory but the buildings need some renovation. Hostel rooms are good with double occupancy including two beds with no mattresses, tables, racks, and mirrored almirahs. There is an extra space above the almirahs for storing additional items.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable, well-qualified, and experienced. They interact with every student. The course curriculum is helpful in multiple disciplines and is an ideal option for students interested in research-oriented careers in any field.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Design (M.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college, with decent future prospects.

content.Placements: We are the second batch here at NIFT Gandhinagar, in M.Des programme. This is a research based course. So, they teach you systems thinking, problem solving thinking and design thinking methods. 4 main specifications in M.Des are curation, social design, UI UX, and strategy management design.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available. It is a bit small campus, compared to other new campuses. Hostel facility is available only for girls of first year. Food is good here. Doctors are available. Sports facilities are available.
content.Faculty: Four main depending specialisations are curation, design for society, ui UX, and strategic manage design. This M.Des programme is research based, and not product centred. It makes the students industry ready. The work we do here is good. 3 assignments, and final jury are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Design (M.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of National Institute of Fashion Technology, Gandhinagar.

content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. Students have to work hard, to get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi facility, a library, and a canteen. Mess facility is available in our college. Our college provides good facilities. The hostel facilities are good. They provide 2 beds, 2 wardrobes, 2 tables, and 2 chairs in each room. They provide washing machine service, with a common room, and an induction stove.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good. The course curriculum is good. They provide curatorial practices, and less visual communication.

admission_overview.college_name: NIFT Gandhinagar Admission 2025 (Open): Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: NIFT Gandhinagaradmission 2025is currently open for various courses. The college offers UG and PG courses in the Business and Management Studies and Design stream. To get admitted to NIFT Gandhinagar, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The university offers more than 10 courses (including specialisation). The application process atNIFT Gandhinagaris conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutNIFT Gandhinagarcourse admission2025.

NIFT Gandhinagar courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. NIFT admission 2025 to most of the courses is based on NIFT 2025 scores followed by situation tests, personal interviews, and Counselling. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularNIFT Gandhinagar courses:

NIFT Gandhinagar admission criteriaare completely entrance-based. Candidates looking for course admission must sit and appear for the NIFT entrance exam first. The admission process broadly involves online registration, entrance test, result declaration, counselling and seat allotment. Students can check NIFT Gandhinagar detailed admission process below:
STEP 1: NIFT Gandhinagar Application Process 2025

Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria can fill out the application form. Eligible students can fill out the application form through the NIFT official website (nift.ac.in/niftadmissions.in/nift.ac.in/admission).
STEP 2: Appear for the Entrance Exam
Post application, aspirants must appear for theNIFT Entrance Exam. The exam is conducted once every year and has TWO parts:
STEP 3: Release of Cutoff List
After the selection rounds, the institute releases theNIFT Gandhinagar cutofflist. The cutoff marks vary from one course to another.
STEP 4: NIFT Counselling

Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks become eligible for counselling. During counselling, a seat allotment procedure is carried out. The complete schedule regarding the same shall be available on the NIFT official website.
STEP 5: Document Verification & Payment of NIFT Gandhinagar Fees
After seat allotment, candidates may have to submit the important documents at the institute. Along with this, candidates are asked to pay some amount of fees as well for seat confirmation.

placement_report.college_name: NIFT Gandhinagar Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NIFT Gandhinagar Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The college has not specifically released the campus report for the year 2023. However, NIFT placement brochure 2023 is available on the official website. As per the annual report 2022, NIFT Gandhinagar successfully conducted the virtual campus placement for phase 1 and for phase 2 organised at NIFT Gandhinagar campus. As per report, NIFT Gandhinagar recorded nearly 82% placement drive during NIFT Gandhinagar placements 2022. Many top recruiters visited the campus during the placement drive 2021-2022 such as Tanishq, Lifestyle, Naukri.com among others. However, this is to note that, the names of companies visitedare gathered from unofficial source.

tables.context: Who are the top recruiters hiring from NIFT Gandhi

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of NIFT Gandhinagar?
faqs.answer: NIFT Gandhinagar has a broad relationship with leading recruiters in the fashion and design industries. Fabindia, Tanishq, Bata, Liberty, H&M, Zara, Marks & Spencer, Myntra, Amazon Fashion, Nykaa Fashion, and Raymond are among the top recruiters. These businesses frequently only hire a small number of students, and the remaining students are usually on their own to find employment. Many students launch multiple startups, which their institution assists them in learning about. Remember that landing your ideal job depends mostly on your abilities, portfolio, and interview performance. Thus, in addition to investigating these possible companies concentrate on developing your skill and expanding your professional network.

faqs.question: How are B.Des placements at NIFT Gandhinagar?
faqs.answer: Employment in NIFT Gandhinagar's Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programme varies somewhat. According to available information, the average salary package for B.Des in 2023 was about 3 LPA-4 LPA and the employment rate in 2022 was about 82%. However, there are indications that employment has not been very good in the last couple of years due to market conditions. Top companies like Tanishq, Lifestyle, Naukri.com, Godrej, Nike, Spyker, Shopper Stop, and H&M are hiring in NIFT Gandhinagar. The highest placement package at NIFT Gandhinagar was Rs. 9 million per annum. Specific details for 2023 are not available, but overall trends indicate mixed employment results for NIFT Gandhinagar's B.Des program.

faqs.question: Does NIFT Gandhinagar offer better placements than National Institute of Fashion Technology, Chennai?
faqs.answer: NIFT Gandhinagar's placement percentage is lower than that of NIFT Chennai. However, NIFT Gandhinagar has made notable progress in recent years, and the difference has shrunk. High placement rates frequently above 90% are a feature of both educational institutions. In 2023, the most expensive package offered by NIFT Gandhinagar was about 12 LPA, while the most expensive package offered at NIFT Chennai was almost 22 LPA. Across various NIFT programmes, such as Fashion Design, Textile Design, Knitwear Design, etc., placement rates could vary significantly. Analyse information for your particular programme of interest. Strong industrial ties and opportunities for employment are provided by NIFT Chennai and Gandhinagar. NIFT Gandhinagar has less placements than NIFT Chennai.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters hiring from NIFT Gandhinagar?
faqs.answer: NIFT Gandhinagar placements have top designers as well as companies from Journalism, Media and FMCG background that offer job opportunities to the students. hostel.description: National Institute of Fashion Technology, Gandhinagar provides hotel facility only for girl students (preferably for first-year students). Facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity, water purifiers, mess, reading rooms, gym, TV, indoor and outdoor games, medical facility etc are provided. A small amphitheater is attached to the hostel for informal activities. Rooms are available on twin sharing basis and all rooms are equipped with the cupboard, table, chair. The hostel has two big common rooms for indoor sports, gymnasium, Yoga, TV, etc.

library.description:
National Institute of Fashion Technology, Gandhinagar has a resource center which consists of the Library Wing and Material Wing. The library consists books on garments, fashion, and technology and also subscribes to fashion journals and fashion forecast. Library also provides fashion periodical Index, bibliographies, subject/ picture files,  videotapes, slides, and CD-ROM. 
The material wing consists of Textiles, Costumes, Finding, and Accessories. The textile collection contains a fully documented collection of woven and printed patterns created for apparel & home furnishings, costume collection consists of well-known designer's clothing and regional costumes of India. Functional materials such as zippers, elastic, buttons, embellishments interfacing, linings and other materials needed to complete the garments are to be found in the findings collection. A variety of belts, bags, costume jewelry, yarn craft etc. is to be found in Accessories section.

reviews.review_text: The master of design is a fairly new course. Classrooms have ACs, projectors and Wi-Fi. The hostel is decent, however there are no AC or cooler in the hostel. There is also strict curfew timings. The college campus is very small, and there is no proper ground for sports. We only have one basketball, and badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: It is average compared to other government design colleges, but far superior than the private ones.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average with good architecture but not maintained. The hostel is available only for girls. The campus is big enough and has enough capacity to host good events. The only place the college lacks is the hostel facilities and there is always a rush to the mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members, but low exposure and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a low infrastructure and a good library. The mess is poor. We have an average hostel and its capacity is low. There are air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi is available all over the college. The labs are well maintained. There is good sports maintenance. Basketball, volleyball. etc., are also available. Average medical facilities are provided. Hostels and PGs are available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: There is a diverse college crowd on our campus.
reviews.review_text: Our campus infrastructure consists of the academic block, auditorium, an amphitheatre, mess, directors bungalow, girls hostel and guest quarters. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with air-conditioners and Wi-Fi. The food served is good in the mess. There is a visiting doctor as well as a counsellor on the premises. There is a basketball, volleyball and badminton court on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a hub of talented and accepting students.
reviews.review_text: It provides everything related to our course available in this college. It is for printing that students have to go to the nearby shopping place but its no big deal because the place is not that far. In other departments since my friends are there in FD and TD and AD, they face issues at times finding materials which they do not find near the college in Gandhinagar and have to travel to Ahmedabad. Our library is diverse and there are a lot of books regarding our course available. The food served...

reviews.review_heading: NIFT GANDHINAGAR- college of fashion, tech, culture and craft.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is for girls is available but only for 1 st year of college. 2nd year onwards you have to search for accommodation outside the campus. Sport and cultural activities takes place pretty often. NIFT GANDHINAGAR's janmashtam's and Garba fest is really happening.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus, and activities are also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides air-conditioned classrooms, conference halls, Wi-Fi, smart TV and resource centre. The infrastructure of our college is average, but it is bearable. The weather is very harsh during the summer. I don't know about the hostel as I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place to discover yourself.
reviews.review_text: The college has very basic infrastructure, and we have equipment's that are as old as 10 years. Labs did not have air-conditioned facility till last year, the library seems a little insufficient and not so updated, Wi-Fi is available in the college but does not have a nice speed.

reviews.review_heading: This college is a good choice for design enthusiasts.
reviews.review_text: The college tries to offer all the facilities in the space available. The campus is Wi-FI enabled along with sitting areas made for working, and all these workspaces have plug points there. Water coolers and washrooms are provided in every corner at each floor, and a full resource library is also provided. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, air-conditioners and proper lights. For each department, they have proper labs like for fashion design department. They have a sewing lab, for the text...

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIFT Gandhinagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available as per the requirement. The advanced machinery is available. Classrooms have smart class facilities. Amphitheatre and auditorium are available. Students of different disciplines are accommodated in different floors of the building so that the other classes do not get disturbed.

paragraphs: The National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Gandhinagar total tuition fee for the BFTech course ranges between INR 6.1 lakh-INR 12.3 lakh. Apart from the total tuition fee, a one-time payment of INR 27,200 (refundable) will be also charged at the time of admission. For a detailed NIFT Gandhinagar BFTech fee structure, click here. This fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
NIFT Gandhinagar offers scholarships to meritorious students. Currently, it offers two scholarships schemes, which are listed below:

NIFT Gandhinagar offers UDAAN - Means cum Merit scheme for foreign students. The scholarship is offered to economically weaker students. The scholarship will be given to Undergraduate and Postgraduate students of the regular programme of NIFT excluding those admitted under NRI/ NRI sponsored category. Students can apply for the scholarship via online application and submitting a fee of INR 2,000.

college_info.intro:
NIFT Kolkata offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and continuing education, and outreach programmes to students across various streams including Fashion Design, Leather Design, Textile Design, and others. But among these courses the BDes programme remains the flagship course of the instute and is highly sought-after among students.
The NIFT Kolkata BDes programme is offered in 7 specialisations, listed below:
The BDes programme is popular among students for not only the flexibility but the sheer breadth of opportunities it unlock in a graduates future design career with students able to go on into Fashion Designer, Graphic Design, Seamstress and other inspiring roles. For more information on BDes at NIFT Kolkata check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute for Fashion Technology, Kolkata established in 1995, is a government college. Students who are seeking to get admitted in National Institute for Fashion Technology, Kolkata should have to appear in written exams conducted by NIFT. The written exams are comprises of creative ability test (CAT) and General Aptitude Test (GAT) B.Des and M.Des candidates have to appear for both and other candidates need to appear only for GAT . Shorlisted students called for situation test / personal interview. If you really want to  pursue fashion designing and you are interested in this area this would not be hard for you .

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Des at the National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: The National institute of fashion technology, Kolkata offers a plethora of courses among which bachelor's in design is very prominent . The course is of four years and the fees of each year is around 1,67,250, which makes a total sum of 6,69,000 for four years. The hostel fee of the college is around 9,000 per semester which the students are bound to pay before shifting, along with a 23000 in advance. If that doesn't fit in your budget you can also go for outside shelters which would cost you Rs 85000 on an average. Above all the infrastructure and the facilities which the college provides for this particular course is worth every penny as it provides specialisation in many streams such as leather design or fashion design.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by the National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: National Institute of Fashion technology, Kolkata is a government college that provides various UG and PG courses. It offers B.Des Fashion designing, B.Des fashion communication, B.Des accesory design, B.Des textile design, B.Des knitwear design, B.Des leather designing and B.F.tech at UG level and MFM at PG levels, in total institution provides eight courses from different streams.Fees for UG and PG courses in this college is between 5.5 - 12.3 Lacs.

review_summary.college_name: NIFT Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des in Accessory Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is decent. You can go for it if you are really passionate about designing.

content.Placements: Accessory Design is doing quite well than other departments, especially for Jewellery Design people. The placements are also going decent. A lot of brands come for college placements as well. We have got labs too. The lab assistants are very good and helpful as well.
content.Infrastructure: Not so good, hostels are ***. The food is bad, the facilities are poor, you have to share rooms and you only get hostels in the first year, after that it's all luck-based. The infrastructure is also very average, I won't recommend it at all. If you have other options, don't opt for it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Knitwear Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with placement as the college charges hefty fee.

content.Placements: Placements are good for some departments and bad for others. FC and F&LA get nice placements while the other 5 departments suffer with either low-paying jobs or even no jobs at times. So, depends on the course you choose. Earlier it was quite good, but it's regrading.
content.Infrastructure: Only a girl's hostel is available and the college is too small. Small playground and library. Overall the college is very small. The labs are enough with all the resources required like knitting machines, overlock machines and of course SNLS machines.

admission_overview.title: NIFT Kolkata Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIFT Kolkata admissions are entrance-based. The institute conducts NIFT Entrance Exam for admission to UG and PG courses. The institute offers BDes, BFTech at UG and MFM programme at the PG level. NIFT Kolkata also provides Indian students with various study abroad opportunities and has collaborated with international universities, including Saxion University-Netherlands, Fashion Institute of Technology-New York, Queensland University of Technology-New Zealand and AMFI-Amsterdam for the same. The admission and application process for the institute commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, fees, and admission procedure for the National Institute of Fashion Technology, Kolkata.

eligibility_selection.title: NIFT Kolkata Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: NIFT Kolkata course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The institute accepts students based on entrance exam scores. However, before appearing for the entrance exam, candidates must be eligible as per the norms of the exam. NIFT Kolkata admission to UG and PG programmes is based on a student's performance in the NIFT Entrance Exam. For NIFT Kolkata UG admissions, the student must not exceed 24 years (29 years for SC/ ST/ PWD category students) of age as of August 1 of the year of admission. paragraphs: NIFT Kolkata admissionis based onentrance exams. Candidates meeting course-specific eligibility can take the NIFT entrance exam to get a seat in the desired programme. The admission process starts with online registration followed by entrance test, result declaration, counselling and seat allotment. Interested students can follow theNIFT Kolkata admission processas given below:
Application Process
Those who fulfil the eligibility can fill out the application form. Eligible students can fill out the application form through the NIFT website atnift.ac.in/niftadmissions.in/nift.ac.in/admission.
Entrance Exam

Students have to appear for the NIFT Entrance Exam which is conducted in two parts: written exams and situation tests/personal interviews. Moreover, the written exam is conducted in online mode. The situation test is in offline mode, and thepersonal interviewis in online mode. The exam includes General Ability Test (GAT) and Creative Ability Test (CAT).
Release of Cutoff List
After the selection rounds, the institute releases theNIFT Kolkata cutoff list. The cutoff marks vary from one course to another.
NIFT Counselling

Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks become eligible for counselling. During counselling, a seat allotment procedure is carried out. The complete schedule regarding the same shall be available on the NIFT official website.
Document Verification & Payment of NIFT KolkataFees
After seat allotment, candidates may have to submit the important documents at the institute. Along with this, candidates are asked to pay some amount of fees as well for seat confirmation.
NIFT Kolkata Fee & Seats 2026

NIFT Kolkata's total tuition feecan be paid annually or semester-wise. However, a few components are paid only once, such as the one-time fee. The students must pay the fee for the desired course at the time of admission.NIFT Kolkata feesdiffer according to the course and specialisation selected by the applicants. Students must pay the admission fee to secure their seats at the institute. Interested candidates can refer to the table below to learn more about theNIFT Kolkata course feeandseat intake:
Note:This data is taken from official sources and can change.

Additionally, the institute also reserves seats for PWD and EWS students. The table contains details forNIFT Kolkata seat reservations:

courses_data.description: At the PG level, NIFT Kolkata offers aMaster of Fashion Management(MFM) programme for two years. Admission is done based on a valid score obtained in GAT, followed by a GD/ PI round. The institute accepts 35 applications every year. Similar to the UG programmes, eligible students need to select one DS and IDM each from their respective departments while pursuing the programme. Read on to know more aboutNIFT Kolkata MFM programme.

faqs.question: Who is eligibile for the MFM course at NIFT Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Candidates completed graduation/bachelor's degree from any recognised institute/university are eligible for the NIFT Kolkata MFM programme. At the PG level, NIFT Kolkata offers MFM programme with a duration of two years. Admission is done on the basis of a valid score obtained in GAT, followed by a GD/ PI round.

courses_data.name: NIFT Kolkata BFTech Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: NIFT Kolkata offers a BFTech programme in Apparel Production for four years. Aspiring candidates need to have passed Class 12 or its equivalent from a recognised board Admission to the same is based on a valid score in GAT. Read on to know more about NIFT Kolkata BFTech programme.

faqs.question: Is BFTech admission at NIFT Kolkata entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Yes,NIFT Kolkata BFTech admissionis based on entrance exam score. The institute shortlists students on the basis of score secured by them in the NIFT Entrance Exam General Ability Test (GAT) section. Students who have passed Class 12 or its equivalent with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics from a recognised board are eligible to apply for the course. Interested students can visit the official website of National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata to know more about the course.

faqs.question: Does NIFT Kolkata offer lateral entry for BFTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIFT Kolkata does offer lateral entry for BFTech programme. The institute provides the course in Apparel Production and it costs aboutINR 5.45 lakh. Students must appear and clear theNIFT Lateral Entry Admissiontest (NLEA) to be eligible for admission. Those fulfiling the admission criteria can visit the official website of the institute to apply for the programme by registering online.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for NIFT Kolkata?
faqs.answer: For admission to NIFT Kolkata, candidates needn to clear the eTh National Institute of Technology (NIFT).The exam isconducted once every yearand hasTWO parts:Written Exams- It comprise the GAT and CAT. The GAT paper is mandatory for all programs, while only BDes candidates need to take the CAT.Situation Test/ Personal Interview- BDes candidates who get shortlisted have to appear in the Situation Test, whereas PG candidates need to appear in a Personal Interview. Theonly exceptionis BFTech program, where the admission merit list will be prepared solely based on GAT scores.The FINAL score of NIFT 2025 for the other programs will be prepared by giving weightage to the written exams and Situation Test/ Personal Interview.

faqs.question: Is National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata hard to get?

The written exams are comprises of creative ability test (CAT) and General Aptitude Test (GAT) B.Des and M.Des candidates have to appear for both and other candidates need to appear only for GAT .
