faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Des at the National Institute of Fashion Technology Kolkata?
faqs.answer: The National institute of fashion technology, Kolkata offers a plethora of courses among which bachelor's in design is very prominent . The course is of four years and the fees of each year is around 1,67,250, which makes a total sum of 6,69,000 for four years. Above all the infrastructure and the facilities which the college provides for this particular course is worth every penny as it provides specialisation in many streams such as leather design or fashion design.

hostel.description: National Institute of Fashion Technology, Kolkata provides hotel facility only for girl students (preferably for first year students). Facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity, water purifies, mess, reading rooms, gym etc are provided. Rooms are available on twin sharing basis and all rooms are equipped with cupboard, table, chair and cots.

library.description: National Institute of Fashion Technology, Kolkata Resource Centre (RC) has library wing and material wing. Library consists of varied books covering information regarding garments, fashion and technology and is subscribed to fashion journals and fashion forecast. Library also has videotapes, slides and CD-ROMs. Material Wing consists of textiles, costumes, finding and accessories. Textile collection contains a fully documented collection of woven and printed patterns created for apparel and home furnishings. Costume collection consists of well-known designer's clothing and regional costumes of India. Findings collection consists of functional materials such as zippers, elastic, buttons, embellishments interfacing, linings and other materials needed to complete the garments. A variety of belts, bags, costume jewellery, yarn craft comprises accessory collection.

admission_overview.college_name: NIFT Patna Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Selection Process, Important Dates

paragraphs: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT), Patna admissionsare based on entrance exam. NIFT Patna offers degree and certificate programmes at the undergraduate (UG) and post-graduate (PG) level. The institute offers courses across Design, Technology and Management streams. UG courses offered byNIFT Patnainclude BDes in Fashion Design, Accessory Design, Textile Design and Fashion Communication. On the other hand, the design school offers only one PG course which is the Master of Fashion Management (MFM). It also offers Continuing Education (CE) programmes in Fashion and Clothing Technology which is of one-year duration.

NIFT Patna admission process for UG and PG courses starts in May every year. Candidates can apply for admission to the course of their choice in online mode. Admission to UG and PG courses is based on marks scored in NIFT Entrance Exam. NIFT Entrance Exam is divided into three parts i.e. Creative Ability Test (CAT), General Ability Test (GAT) and Situation Test/ Group Discussion and Personal Interview (GD and PI) round. Candidates planning to pursue BDes are required to appear for CAT and GAT exams followed by the Situation Test. A valid score in the GAT exam is required for admission to BFTech. Students are selected for the MFM programme based on their performance in the GAT exam followed by the GD and PI round conducted by the institute. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forNIFT Patna courses:
Eligibility
Bachelor's Degree (Fashion Design/Leather Design/Accessory Design/Textile Design/Knitwear Design/Fashion Communication)
NIFT Entrance Exam+ Counseling
BFTech from National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) or BE/BTech
NIFT Entrance Exam + Counseling
NIFT Entrance Exam + Counseling
Passed Class 12 from a recognised board/ university
Merit-based
Read More:NIFT Prospectus 2025

NIFT Patna offers BDes, BFTech, MFMand certificate courses at the UG and PG level. The total tuition fee for various courses ranges between INR 90,200 to INR 12.3 lakh. Students can check the table below to know some of the course-wise total tuition fees and ROI:

A total of 234 seats are available for various courses at NIFT Patna. Majority of setas are available for BDes course is 136. A total of 34 seats are available for BFTech and MFM course, respectively. Students can check the list of seats available for various courses from the table presented below:

NIFT patna reserved seats on certain terms and conditions. The seats reserved for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/GEN-EWS/Person With Disability (PWD)/Foreign National/State Domicile, in each programme are as under:

The NIFT Patna admission criteria is entrance-based. The candidates have to start the NIFT Patna admission process by completing the NIFT registration process followed by appearing for the entrance exam and other selection rounds. The detailed steps of the NIFT Patna admission process are mentioned below:
Step 1: NIFT Patna Registration Process 2025

To apply for NIFT Patna courses, interested candidates have to visit its official website and fill out the NIFT application form. Candidates are advised to check the eligibility criteria before applying for their desired course.
The candidates must note that the NIFT registration process will be considered completed when the application fee is successfully paid.
Step 2: NIFT Patna Entrance Exam and Selection Rounds
The NIFT entrance exam is conducted in two parts:
Step 3: NIFT Patna Counselling
Candidates who meet the NIFT cutoff for NIFT Patna will be invited to the counselling round. Document verification and seat allotment process is carried out during the counselling process.
Step 4: NIFT Patna Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their seat in NIFT Patna.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.FTech course at NIFT Patna?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Fashion Technology offers a four-year full-time BFTech course at the UG level. Candidates seeking admission to the BFTech course need to appear for an entrance examination comprising of a General Ability Test (GAT). Shortlisted candidates of the entrance examination are then required to appear for a Personal Interview (PI) round.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.FTech course at NIFT Patna?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Patna fee is in between INR 9 lakh-INR 12.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.Apart from the tuition fee, candidates also need to pay a one-time fee of INR 27,200 which includes a refundable security deposit and registration fee. For a detailed NIFT Patna BFTech fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the institute.

faqs.question: Is pursuing B.Ftech at National Institute of Fashion Technology Patna expensive?
faqs.answer: Hi.B.F.Tech. in Apparel Production at NIFT Patna is a 4 years course at the UG level. The course offers admission to 44 students. The total tuition fee for NIFT Patna B.F.Tech. in Apparel Production is INR 12.34 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 27,200, and a hostel fee of amount INR 63,400 that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee.Thanks

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for MFM admission at NIFT Patna?
faqs.answer: NIFT Patna MFM application process is typically conducted between November and June. For MFM admissions 2025, the registration process started on Nov 22,  2024. The last date to register online was Jan 6,  2025. Candidates who missed the deadline could apply with an additional late fee of INR 5,000 till Jan 9,  2025.

faqs.question: Can I join National Institute of Fashion Technology Patna directly?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join National Institute of Fashion Technology Patna directly. You need to qualify in the entrance exam in order to take admission. The entrance exam is conducted by the university which is NIFT test. This exam contains various levels or steps like aptitude test, situation test, group discussion etc. Students need to qualify in the entrance exams and the cutoff. The cutoff will be released according to the number of seats and applicants. After the student qualifies in the cutoff he/she will pass through final admission steps and will get the final admission.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to various courses at NIFT Patna?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT), Patna admissions are based on entrance exam. NIFT Patna offers degree and certificate programmes at the undergraduate (UG) and post-graduate (PG) level. Students can check the table below to knwo the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria from the table presented below:CourseEligibilitySelectionBDesBachelor's Degree (Fashion Design/Leather Design/Accessory Design/Textile Design/Knitwear Design/Fashion Communication)NIFT Entrance Exam + CounselingBFTechBFTech from National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) or BE/BTechNIFT Entrance Exam + CounselingMFMGraduateNIFT Entrance Exam + Counseling

faqs.question: What rank is required for admission to various courses at NIFT Patna?
faqs.answer: NIFT Patna cutoff 2024 was concluded for all the UG and PG courses. NIFT 2024 counselling had four regular rounds and one SPOT round of seat allotment for admission to the B.Des, M.Des, B.F.Tech, M.F.Tech, and M.F.M courses. During theNIFT Patna cutoff 2024, the most in-demand course wasB.Des. in Fashion Communicationwith a last-round cutoff of1339. For the same course, the closing cutoff was1812in 2023, while in 2022, the cutoff closed at1513for the candidates belonging to the General AI quota.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B Des at National Institute of Fashion Technology Patna?
faqs.answer: There are many specialisations in B Des course at National Institute of Fashion Technology. The specialisations include:-B Des in fashion designing.B Des in accessory designing.B Des in fashion communication.B Des in textile designing.Each of these specialisations have approximately44 seatsintake. All rooms are semi furnished with table, chair, inbuilt shelves, bed, mattress, etc. Water purifies, canteen, medical assistance, Wi-Fi, indoor sports facility, reading rooms are few of the facilities that are available at NIFT Patna hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It good. Fees is to much
reviews.review_text: All over the infrastructure is good all facilities is provided. Mess and canteen is there with good quality of food. We have cultural department aur lot of activities for student in with they compete with other campuses of NIFT. wifi, labs, ac all are good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm enjoying my college life still ....it get disappointing sometimes for some students
reviews.review_text: We are provided, 24/7 wifi service,  library access till 10pm , weaving lab , jackurd lab, Dyeing lab , classrooms,  basket ball court , common study room , hall for dance practice,  gym , cold water etc. Quality of food is good but sometimes it varies, I don't ear canteen food neither I stay in hostel. They provide basic medical facility and provide a health card every in which you can claim 3 lakh money for your medical emergency.

reviews.review_heading: My college life is interesting.
reviews.review_text: The library is so good. I'm not a hosteler so I don't know about hostels. The labs are to good; there are all the things required that are needed. But in its labs, some computers are not working and the most important thing you have to do is buy a laptop. If you have one, then it's good to bring it with you to every IT class, like DDC. If you don't have a laptop, please buy one. A laptop is so important in your first year. You have to make lots of assignments and presentations on your laptop. An...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, and separate IT laboratories for different departments are available. There are also GC, AD, and TB laboratories in the respective departments. There is also a photography laboratory for the FC department. The food served in the canteen is good. Nescafe is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent. All the labs are well-equipped. In sewing lab many new machine are available that are automated to give a clear vision of industry. It is only center in which mechatronics lab is present so that the students can experiment and do something innovative in field of garment manufacturing.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied due to facilities and infrastructure. Dissatisfied due to below average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure that was available were design labs - Garment construction lab, Pattern making lab, smart classrooms, Nescafe shop, resource centre with computer/books facilities along with many other facilities. All the facilities are really good. The hostel facility was very good but the mess food was not.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied. The college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Amenities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, computer labs, photography studio, photography equipment, resource centre, library, magazines, and trend forecasting agency subscription are available here. The hostel is good. The canteen is average. Medical facilities need improvement. Sports and games are average here.

reviews.review_heading: It's one in a lifetime experience. You need to churn the best out of it!
reviews.review_text: Everything mentioned here in points one and two was available. Just that the entire infrastructure and exploration and exposure to the industry was way lesser compared to other centres. Which I assume has gotten better now as the entire infrastructure has been built.

reviews.review_heading: Do not opt for this college.
reviews.review_text: Good. But faculty members are very laid back. Lot of favoritism happens. If you satisfy the ego of teachers there you would probably be the best student in your department and with most "creative" skills. They do judge if you are from a tribal community or OBCs.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied with faculty, curriculum, and the over whelming campus environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus, and its quality is very good. Labs are well-equipped with all facilities and services. A library is available with all resources and an adequate number of computers for students with access to all official sites. Printers and Xerox machines are also available for students. The gym is awesome with a healthy environment and all machines and equipment. Students get a medical insurance card of up to 10 lacs per semester. Every classroom has A/C and pr...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful. The campus has 3 buildings, 2 of them have classrooms and labs, and the other one is the admin block. There are girls' hostels on the campus, with a capacity of 250 girls. The campus has a basketball court, volleyball ground etc. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very attractive and appealing. The campus has 3 main buildings. This campus is the biggest among the all NIFT campus. There is a well-managed resource centre on the campus. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are air-conditioned, and it is equipped with projectors, table, and chairs. Hostels are available along with all the required things. Food served in the canteen is the worst. The quality and hygiene condition of the food is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the campus, opportunities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is awesome. The college offers a very friendly and natural environment. Classrooms and IT labs are fully air-conditioned. The college has the largest canteen among the other NIFT centres. A girls' is available for girl students of all the years, and the girls' hostel is fully enabled with Wi-Fi facility. Playgrounds are large enough.

reviews.review_heading: Life, education and innovative inside nift Patna.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of nift Patna is one of the best among all nift centres. Free Wi-Fi, garment construction lab, pattern making lab, accessories design lab, photoroom, resources center is available in nift Patna. Nift Patna has beautifully build badminton and basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with everything. We got a good place for increasing our knowledge.
reviews.review_text: We got AC classrooms. We have good infrastructure along with good space for other activities. We have resource room and Mac lab for better understanding. We got 3 or 4 free Wi-Fi connections. They are providing one room for two students. We even have a good space and courts for sports activities. Coming to the canteen, the quality of the food is okay.

NIFT Sarthak: This scholarship waives off 50% to 100% of tuition fees of the students depending on their gross family income.

Course admissions depend on the institution's in-house entrance exam scores or Hamstech All-India Design Entrance Test.

faqs.answer: A:    No entrance exam results are accepted by Hamstech Institute of Creative Education for admission to its B.A. programs. The institute accepts applications directly from candidates, and admissions are determined on merit. Candidates must have passed the 10+2 exam from an accredited board in order to be eligible for the B.A. programme at Hamstech Institute of Creative Education. A minimum of 40% on the CBSE 12th exam is needed to be admitted to B.A. courses at Hamstech Institute of Creative Education

faqs.answer: A:    Undergraduate courses at Hamstech Institute of Creative Education in Hyderabad, Telangana, range from INR 144,000–168,000 per year. Postgraduate courses range from INR 144,000–400,000 per year. The average fee per year is INR 166,000.

review_summary.college_name: Hamstech Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Textile and Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I suggest the college should conduct more shows and visit famous boutiques.

content.Placements: The average salary package offered was 7 LPA. Top boutiques like Sabyasachi visit the campus for placements. Almost 70% of the students from our course got an internship in the boutique. Top roles like fashion consultant and designer are offered to the students. Around 50% of the students got placed in companies. The lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 3.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It is a day college, so there are no hostels for any branch students. Classrooms are very innovative and awesome, and they help us to adapt to the environment of design. Our college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. There are no canteens in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Fashion Design - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied with the teaching and good placements offered.

content.Placements: Our batchmates got placed according to their performance during the course and portfolios presented. We had offers from retail industries, and huge brands. Even internships were also offered under reputed designers. A few students got hired after the internship phrase.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was not so great. It was hard to find parking spots, and roads were flooded during monsoon season. But the classrooms and labs were well maintained and clean. We had receptionist in the entrance who was very helpful to find the classrooms or any other help needed for students. We also had free Wi-Fi, and the food served in the canteen was good.

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Fashion Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good facilities. It is a good college.

content.Placements: The college provides placements.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good. The college conducts a fashion show. The college provides a library and a canteen. The college provides good facilities and good communication skills.
content.Faculty: The college offers good courses like a costume designer, fashion designer, illustrator designer and photographer, banking courses, interior design, graphic designer, pattern making, garment construction, etc.
content.Other: The college conducts some cultural programs like sports day, workshops, guest lecture and class meeting. The college is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best college with real-time experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: We have a very good placement cell at our college. Before the internship completes, we will get placements in the top and mid-level companies according to our knowledge and work. We will even get opportunities as interns in good companies. Our previous batches and present passing out batches have got good placements and are doing well in their respective jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good and are equipped with air-conditioners and projectors. Furniture is good, and there are separate labs for computers and workshop rooms. We have a library, and we got a good collection of books related to our fields. We have a spacious canteen, and the good thing is that the canteen is open until the college is closed.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Interior Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm really happy to be a part of this institution.

content.Placements: I'm a third-semester student from Hamstech. I have many friends from the senior batch who have been selected for jobs. They got placements in good companies with high salaries. I'm looking forward to see if I will be able to get good placements, and I am confident about doing it.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities in the college including Wi-Fi, air-conditioners, etc. All of them are always in working condition and will be repaired immediately if we have any problem. The canteen is very spacious and serves good quality food along with good taste.

paragraphs: TheHAMSTECH College of Creative Education admission processis a three-step process that begins with the release of application forms and ends with the payment of admission fees and document verification process. The detailedHAMSTECH admission processis given below:
HAMSTECH Application Process

The admission process starts with filling HAMSTECH College of Creative Education application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website of HAMSTECH to apply for HDET exam and their course choice along with making the fee payment for each course.
HAMSTECH Selection Process
The students would be selected based on their HDET exam scores. Other selection rounds may be conducted as per the college's guidelines.
HAMSTECH Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.A (Hons) in Fashion Design from Hamstech?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a BA degree in Fashion Design, students can seek out jobs in the government sector. The most suitable industry to pursue would be the Textile Industry. The Ministry of Textiles was set up by the Indian Government for planning, development, export promotion, and regulation of the textile industry. The ministry recruits candidates with relevant work experience and knowledge. A BA from Hamstech equips students with knowledge of various fields such as Draping, Design, Handloom, Textile and more. Students interested in pursuing a government job after the degree must stay updated with the official website of the Ministry of Textiles to know all the recent recruitment updates. As per unofficial sources, the monthly salary offered to students selected in the 2023 recruitment drive was INR 70,000. With more experience and enhanced skills, students can expect to get better pay in the future.

faqs.question: What are the career scope offered after BA at HAMSTECH?
faqs.answer: The BA pay for graduates can vary depending on the specialisation chosen by the candidates. Experience, geography, and specialisation are all factors that can influence BA pay in India. In India, the average BA salary for graduates is roughly INR 3-8 LPA. Graduates can enhance their salaries by doing internships and job placements since it would add to their experiences. The table below depicts the pay distribution of BA graduates in India after pursuing BA career from Hamstech Institute of Creative Education. : Job Position Average Annual Salary (in INR) Writer 4.8 LPA Historian 3.8 LPA Social Worker 4.5 LPA Executive Assistant 5.3 LPA Psychologist 6.5 LPA Counsellor 4.2 LPA Language Expert 5 LPA

highlights.summary: The NCHMCT JEE 2026 registration process has been extended till Mar 25, 2026, for CT Institute of Hospitality Management admission to the BSc (Hospitality & Hotel Administration) course. The exam for the same will be held on Apr 25, 2026.

placements.overview:
CT Institute of Hospitality Management is a private institute and is located in Jalandhar, Punjab. CT Institute of Hospitality Management courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. CT Institute of Hospitality Management offers a total of 8 courses in streams such as Design, Hospitality & Travel and Aviation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., BHMCT, UG Diploma and MHMTT and the total seat intake for the available courses is 450. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fashion Design, Food Production and Travel & Tourism Management. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 46,000 to 2,40,000 and the average median salary is around INR 2,62,833. Apart from this, the CT Institute of Hospitality Management campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Candidates seeking admission to the programmes offered by the institute can apply online. The application form is available on the official website of the institute. The candidates can fill and submit the same before the last date. CT Institute of Hospitality Management admission is merit-based.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good and worthy college for students.

content.Placements: Ct group of colleges has a very nice record with placements. Multinational companies come every year with good annual packages. Ct group of colleges placement cells gives interview training and makes students job-ready. Ct group of colleges is top ranked in North India for placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has a central library with huge collection of books and Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus. Hostel facilities is also here for both boys and girls with good condition rooms, hygienic food and regular cleaning facilities. There is an auditorium as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good campus life and crowd.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students got very good placements from our college under top recruitment companies. Our college provides internship which is part of the job training so that students know how the work is done. Our college provides top roles.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with the best infrastructure and facilities any college could ever provide. We have classrooms that are very neat, clean and air-conditioned. We have a library and a computer lab where students can spend their day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Placements and facilities are good.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 to 85% of students got recruitments in top companies from our college. Our college also provides the best internships and offer top roles in multiple companies. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are commendable. All the classrooms are air-conditioned. We also have computer labs and an auditorium where we take sessions regularly. There is a canteen on the campus where nutritious food is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of CT Institute of Hotel Management.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are great. Top companies visit our college and select students. Our college doesn't guarantee 100% placements, but most of the students get selected in the campus selection. The average salary package offered to the students ranges from 10-12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. The campus is lush green and very beautiful. The hostel facility provided by the college is also awesome, and there are two separate buildings for both boys and girls. The warden of the hostel is also a caretaker. Practical labs are awesome.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80 to 85% of students in this course were placed in our college. The highest package offered by the recruitment companies was 250000 per annum and the average package was 100000 rupees per annum. Our college provides with the best of internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college is really commendable as the campus life is great and the crowd is great too. The infrastructure for our course is brilliant. All the classrooms are air conditioned. We also have a library where children can read anything they want and 1 canteen is also available.

admission_process.title: CT Institute of Hospitality Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CT Institute of Hospitality Management admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingDesign, Hospitality and Travel and Aviation.CT Institute of Hospitality Managementadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNCHMCT JEE, CBSE 12th, and PSEB 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 46,000 - 2,40,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 18 months - 4 years.

reviews.review_text: The college is really commendable as the campus life is great and the crowd is great too. The infrastructure for our course is brilliant. All the classrooms are air conditioned. We also have a library where children can read anything they want and 1 canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it is developing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is commendable, and every student enjoys campus life. Students can easily adjust here. Quality of the food served in the canteen is very good and nutritious. Our college also provides a library and computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CT Institute of Hotel Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is beautiful and the labs are very spacious and pretty much good. The college provides hostel facilities for both and girls and boys in different buildings. The food served in the mess is also good. Canteen also serves pretty much hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and every student gets placed and even teachers are so helpful.
reviews.review_text: We have many practical labs with full equipment for practical knowledge. They have a separate library for the HM holders. I am a day scholar, but my friends who stay in the hostel say that it is good. The mess is pretty awesome, and the canteen is the best part as there is a bakery inside the college. There are every sport and game in college. We even conduct half marathon.

reviews.review_heading: Really it is a excellent college for hotel management and all the teachers are well qualified.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities provided in our courses like computer labs, restaurants, bar, production labs, front office labs and housekeeping labs because they play a major role in our course. There is an average quality of food is provided in the hostel mess and there is every month very events are there in which every talent games are there.

reviews.review_heading: A way for the good future and the journey starts here.
reviews.review_text: The college had the very good infrastructure. There is a 24 hours Wi-Fi facility in the campus with very high-speed for hostelers also. There are proper labs for the practicals and different labs for every subject. There is a very good library. For entertainment, sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: Placement and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our college are very suitable to the students, and they are adopting it. All the classrooms and the corridor need are clean, and all the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The canteen provides very nutritious food.

reviews.review_heading: I had a satisfying experience of education and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is well-organised. There are many facilities for students according to their fields, such as labs, seminar halls and playgrounds. Our field needs practical experience along with theoretical, and it is also provided within the campus.

The college extends seven specialisations in BSc, six in BA and two specialisations each under BVoc and BBA. The course duration of all the UG programmes is three years. DYPACSC offers BA, BSc and BCom under two categories: Aided and Non-aided. At PG level, the institute offers MSc in five specialisations, MA in three and MCom in two specialisations. faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for the B.Sc at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College?

overview_faqs.question: Does Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Regarding Admission Cancellation by Students: For Undergraduate programs such as BBA and B.Sc.-HS, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1100 is deemed non-refundable. Similarly, for Master's Programs like MBA, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1500 is non-refundable. Refund Policy: Within the initial 10 days of enrollment (post-fee payment), a full refund of 100% is applicable. From the 11th day until the commencement of the session, deductions are made at the rate of Rs. 1000 towards administrative charges, with the remainder refunded. No refunds are issued once the session begins (in January and July), and fees are expected to be paid in full. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information.

The fee structure is divided into two parts the student can pay his or her fee twice in a year. The admission process is very satisfying and easy because the staff present there is well supportive of students from every category. There are different kinds of scholarships available for category students. In addition you can contact the admission department for further information

review_summary.college_name: Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dr. D. Y. Patil ACS College - Empowering education in arts, commerce, and science.

content.Placements: 70-100% of students got placed. The lowest salary is 1 LPA. The average salary is 3 LPA - 10 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Syngenta, Capera, Capcut, Canva, Google, Amazon, AWS, and Infosys. 60-65% of students got internships at TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Capcut, Canva, and Capera. Roles offered are data analyst, junior analyst, business analyst, and network officer.
content.Infrastructure: It's quite good and the experience of the college is really next level. Though there is some shortage of sports and games, but the given facilities are top-notch. The quality of canteen food is also really tasty and craving. I like it and always whenever I go to eat there, I always have maggi with black coffee.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: It was very good. Many multinational companies came for placements, and offers were also good. But, the college didn't have a very strong placement record overall, it was average. The percentage of students getting placed each year was about 40%. Companies that visited the college included Infosys and others. The average package was 2–3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I resided at my home, so I commuted to the college daily and did not know about the hostel facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure, excellent teachers, and coordinated staff members.

content.Placements: A high number of students got placements this year. The highest package this year ranges from 9-10 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Companies like Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, etc., visit the college to hire students. A high number of students got internships in companies like Wipro and TCS. A few students got internships at Cognizant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and toilets are very clean. Overall, it is an A+ grade in my opinion.
content.Faculty: Teachers are one of the most helpful things that happened to me in college. They are the only reason that I got great grades in my academics. The course curriculum is accurate and relevant. It does make students market-ready because of the knowledge that is provided in the college. Faculty members and staff members are very respectful and responsible. They are very experienced and provide great knowledge according to courses.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.

content.Placements: A high percentage of students get placed in my college. The highest package offered in my course for students is 18 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit the college to hire students from my college. The percentage of students who get internships in this course is more than 80%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in my college are good. Classrooms, a library, and all things are available in this course. The food quality offered in my college to students is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available in this course.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc in Data Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Teaching staff, cleanliness, security, a library, and medical emergency services.

content.Placements: As for placements, the students were eligible from the beginning of the third year (5th semester). Our college has tried working with some good companies like TCS, UST, CTS, Infosys, Zoho, Wipro, and many more. The average package was 6 LPA and the highest was 30 LPA. 90% of the students got placed in our college each year. I was confident that before getting my degree, I would get placed, so after getting my degree, I would continue to work for a year, and after that, I had many other plans that weren't related to any IT department or software.

admission_process.title: Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dr. D Y Patil Arts, Commerce & Science College in Pune offers a range of undergraduate programs including BA, BSc, BCA, BCom, BBA, and BVoc. The BSc program includes seven specialisations, the BA programme includes six, and both the BVoc and BBA programs offer two specialisations each. All undergraduate programs have a duration of three years.Dr. D Y Patil Arts, Commerce & ScienceCollege provides BA, BSc, and BCom courses in two categories: Aided and Non-aided. At the postgraduate level, the college offers an MSc with five specializations, an MA with three, and an MCom with two specialisations, all of which are two years long.

For Dr D YPatil Arts, Commerce & Science College admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toDr D YPatil Arts, Commerce & Science College courses2025:

courses_data.name: Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce and Science BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: For the 2024 academic year, B.Sc. admissions at Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce, and Science College require a minimum of 50% in the class 12 board exam for general applicants, with reduced cutoffs of 45% for OBC, SC, and ST categories. Admission is based on class 12 percentages in Physics, Chemistry, Maths, and Biology, with cutoffs varying by course. The college accepts scores from ISC and Maharashtra HSC.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri?
faqs.answer: As per current year 2024 students in Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College get admission on the basis of class 12 percentage in Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology subjects. For the admission in DY Patil college students in BSc minimum 50% in class 12 board examination for applying to B.Sc computer Science. The cutoff varies with different course . Cutoff drops to 45% if the candidates is from reserve categories like OBC, SC and ST.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. D. Y. Patil ACS College - Empowering education in arts, commerce, and science.
reviews.review_text: It's quite good and the experience of the college is really next level. Though there is some shortage of sports and games, but the given facilities are top-notch. The quality of canteen food is also really tasty and craving. I like it and always whenever I go to eat there, I always have maggi with black coffee.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: I resided at my home, so I commuted to the college daily and did not know about the hostel facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure, excellent teachers, and coordinated staff members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and toilets are very clean. Overall, it is an A+ grade in my opinion.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are good. Classrooms, a library, and all things are available in this course. The food quality offered in my college to students is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available in this course.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching staff, cleanliness, security, a library, and medical emergency services.
reviews.review_text: There were not many festival events. Some of them were Navratri Dandiya, Diwali, etc. You could take any book from the library you just needed a library card. You could even take reference books and semester books. There were fair events for sports, but not many. The students got along fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities. They are good. The department is also good. Wi-Fi service is there. There is a lab service. We have many hostel facilities. They are good. I have not taken a hostel pass. It is poor. My friends stay in the hostel. The quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce, and Science, Pimpri.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. The college has Wi-Fi with a password but the connectivity is 0. There is no network on most of the floors. The campus is very small, with a law and women's colleges. The college doesn't have a canteen. I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know much. Rooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are arrogant and egoistic but their knowledge is above par.
reviews.review_text: I have heard that the infrastructure is good. The food, water, and everything are fine, not good but not bad as well. Wi-Fi password is not given to students and it is only for faculty members. The library is amazing with all the academic books. Classrooms are big but the benches are small and broken. There are no sanitary pads in the girl's washrooms and no mirrors to check whether we're appropriately dressed. Washrooms stinks and there is no handwash, no issues, and no hand dryer. There is no ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are present in this course. The infrastructure of this course is so good. Wi-Fi, classroom, and library—everything is present. The food quality made in this college is so good. Medical facilities are present. Sports and games are available in this course.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, likely average, but fine.
reviews.review_text: The campus area is small, but the college infrastructure is likely to be good, and the cleaning and peon staff are also good. The college has many departments such as sports, NCC, NSS, and computers. All the things in the college are average, but some outside students may not find them as good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. DY Patil College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for students in my college are so good. Wi-Fi and classrooms, as well as a library, are available in my college. The quality of food made in the canteen in college is so tasty, and medical facilities are available. However, sports are not available in my course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr DY Patil Pimpri.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Good labs, well-maintained and better classrooms. The library is peaceful and has the required books, also very helpful while studying and during exams. The sports ground is available. Food in the canteen is better than outside, not going to lie. Medical facilities are available in emergencies too.

reviews.review_heading: Form my side college is okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good and peaceful. In front of the college gate, there is a Shree Swami Samarth small temple; it gives very positive vibes. There is good maintenance. Elevators for students and faculty. In our college, there are no hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with educational values and teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college with good infrastructure provides a comprehensive and supportive environment that encourages extracurricular activity. Classrooms were equipped with modern facilities such as projectors, comfortable seating arrangements, big library, and practical rooms.

reviews.review_heading: As I am in my third year right now, I am actually dissatisfied with the college management.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi provided for students. Computer labs are good, classrooms are average, and the library is average too. I don't know much about the hostel as I live with my family, but the computers in the computer lab are much lower than expected. There are a total of 6 labs, and each lab contains nearly 30 computers each.

paragraphs: The total fee for the Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) course at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College, Pimpri, Pune is INR 2,07,255, including a hostel fee of INR 5,40,000. The first-year fee is INR 63,910, and the college also offers an application form fee of INR 33,180 In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more. To learn more you can also contact the admission department

Regarding Admission Cancellation by Students: For Undergraduate programs such as BBA and B.Sc.-HS, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1100 is deemed non-refundable. Similarly, for Master's Programs like MBA, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1500 is non-refundable. Refund Policy: Within the initial 10 days of enrollment (post-fee payment), a full refund of 100% is applicable. From the 11th day until the commencement of the session, deductions are made at the rate of Rs. 1000 towards administrative charges, with the remainder refunded. No refunds are issued once the session begins (in January and July), and fees are expected to be paid in full. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information.

The fee structure for a B.Sc at Dr D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College is 20,300 (1st year fee). The fee structure is divided into two parts the student can pay his or her fee twice in a year. The admission process is very satisfying and easy because the staff present there is well supportive of students from every category. There are different kinds of scholarships available for category students. In addition you can contact the admission department for further information

Some of the most popular courses offered at CT University are BSc, BTech, BPharma, PhD, and BCA. For admission in BTech courses, the Class 12 percentage plays a vital role.
CTU offers four year BTech course in four specialisations i.e. Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Chemical Engineering. However, as per the details collated from students' reviews on Shiksha, the highest package offered to BTech CSE students in recent years was INR 51 LPA. The average package generally ranges between INR 3 LPA and INR 4 LPA. Further, the lowest package offered in the past few years of CT University placements for BTech CSE was INR 10 LPA. Students have also reviewed that the placement cell of the University helps in e

The other top sectors that involve the majority of alumni are Business Development and Operations. faqs.question: Where are CT University alumni working?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CT University courses are offered to students under various streams such as Management, Engineering, Law, Arts, Science, Humanities, etc., at UG, PG, and other levels. Every course has its eligibility criteria and their fee structure. Some of the programs offered by CTU Ludhiana are Bachelor of Commerce, Diploma in Business Administration, Bachelor of Computer Applications, Bachelor of Technology, BA, LLB (5-year integrated program), and so on.

faqs.answer: A:    CT University is not hard to get, provided the majority of courses consider 45% to 50% of aggregate in Class 12. For majority of PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. Apart from this, candidates must obtain a valid score in CTSET which is the University conducted exam for majority of courses provided by it.
faqs.question: Is CT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    CT University has specified the eligibility requirements that an MBA aspirants must satisfy to be eligible to take admission at the university. Candidates who have scored at least 50%  in a bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university/institute. The minimum aggregate required in the case of SC candidates is 45%.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for CT University MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the Shiksha verified reviews, CT University does not have a dress code. However, during induction programs or guest lectures, students are requested to wear formals. In addition to this, CTU students are expected to dress according to the occasion whether it be a sports day, orientation day etc.
faqs.question: Is there any dress code at CTU?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for the BTech programme at CT University the candiates need to have a minimum of 50% in their class 12 from a recognised board, with any of the following combinations: Non-Medical, Commerce, or Arts. BTech is also offered as a three-year lateral entry programme and the candidates need to take LEET exam for admission to the lateral entry programme at CT University.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA (Hons.) in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence with IBM - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.

review_content.Placements: In the BCA IBM course, we have 2 sections for 2 years which have more than 250 students. The package of BCA starts from 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered till now ranges from 5-7 LPA and that is too difficult. Because no student wants to sit in the placement of CT University. The reason for this is that they have very useless companies to provide placements. CT University BCA students have seen placements with companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Byju's. Approximately 40% of students will go for internships which is decided by the university authorities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from CT University, Ludhiana Batch 2026, and the course is ongoing. Around 70–75% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, the lowest is 12 LPA, and the average is 16 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Alpha IT, Cisco, etc. Around 60–65% of students get internships at companies like Novem Control, TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Technical Support Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

review_summary.college_name: CT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Nice college and everything.

content.Placements: I did B.Sc. fashion design course, and passed it in 2025. My experience is too great. The highest package is 5 LPA- 6 LPA. The percentage of students got internships from this course is 70% to 75%. Every course has its specialty, then if you are interested in any of them, so you can take admission and listen to your heart.
content.Infrastructure: They provide the facility of Wi-Fi and the Wi-Fi speed is too great The quality of the food is very great every week. The main course is filled with protein and vitamins, all we need. They didn't force us to focus on study, only they also said to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: CT University is in the heart of our city.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placements in the reputable industry. The highest package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Students get internships in companies. They do everything for the betterment of students. They organised internships in companies like Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is very luxurious. The food of the canteen is very hygienic and a good quality. The food in the mess is very hygienic and of good quality. There are all types of books available for the students in the library.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence with IBM - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.

content.Placements: In the BCA IBM course, we have 2 sections for 2 years which have more than 250 students. The package of BCA starts from 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered till now ranges from 5-7 LPA and that is too difficult. Because no student wants to sit in the placement of CT University. The reason for this is that they have very useless companies to provide placements. CT University BCA students have seen placements with companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Byju's. Approximately 40% of students will go for internships which is decided by the university authorities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.

content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from CT University, Ludhiana Batch 2026, and the course is ongoing. Around 70–75% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, the lowest is 12 LPA, and the average is 16 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Alpha IT, Cisco, etc. Around 60–65% of students get internships at companies like Novem Control, TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Technical Support Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, supportive environment, and steady placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 70–80% of students from our course get placed through campus recruitment. The highest package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5–3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Novem Tech, and Vers. About 60–70% of students get internship opportunities through college support.
content.Infrastructure: The department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both academic and practical learning. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi facility are available throughout the academic blocks. The mess food is average, with a set food menu for a week.

admission_overview.college_name: CT University Course Admissions 2025: Application Process, Eligibility Criteria, Fees

paragraphs: CT University admission 2025to most of the UG and PG programmes is entrance-based. The University has industry and academic tie-ups with various reputed organisations and MNCs. CTU offers various UG and PG courses in streams, includingEngineering, Science, Management, Law, Medical Sciences, Commerce, and Information Technology. CT University application forms can be filled in both online and offline modes.

CT Universityprovides a range of programmes including BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BCA, MSc, BBA and BCom.CT University course admissionis entrance-based and candidates can apply online for admission to these courses. Check out the table for highlights related to CT University admission:
Particulars
CT University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
Admission status 2023
Accepted entrance exams
How to apply?
Online at (https://ctuniversity.in/)
Offline at the University campus
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

CT University admissionis based on merit as well as entrance exam scores of candidates. Before getting admission to the courses offered at CT University. The candidates need to make sure they fulfil the eligibility criteria. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for CT University courses:

CT University feesare cumulative of multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, library deposits, caution deposits, etc. Some of the fee components are one-time paid, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Apart from this, the CT University's course-wise seat intake varies. Availability of seats is one of the determining factors for admission. The fee amount varies from course to course. Check below the year-wise CT University fees and seat intake for top courses:
NOTE:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The admission procedure at CT University includes the following steps: online/ offline application, meeting eligibility criteria, qualifying CTSET, preparation of a merit list, counseling for course selection, document verification, fee payment, and final admission. It's essential to check the university's website or contact the admission office for specific course requirements and updates. Find below the step-wise CT University admission process:
Step 1: CT University Application Process

The admission process begins with filling out an online application form on the official website of CT University or offline by visiting the campus. Apart from that, candidates need to appear for the CT SET entrance exams conducted by the university. The application for CT SET has to be filled out separately through the official website of the university.
Step 2: CT University Selection Rounds
Admission to CT University courses is both merit and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, candidates are required to qualify for the CT SET exam.
Step 3: CT University Counselling Process/ Merit Release

Based on the scores in the CT SET, past academic records and performance of candidates in other selection rounds, the college releases a merit list. Further, for direct admissions, the college conducts a counselling process based on candidates' scores obtained in the last examination.
Step 4: Provisional Admission Notice

After the selection rounds, a provisional admission notice will be sent to the selected candidates. Later on, candidates can proceed with the other admission formalities such as fee payment and document verification (if required). For more details about the final admission process, candidates may visit the official website of CT University.
For more information about CT University check out the below video:

faqs.question: Is there BTech at CT University?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech programme is offered under four specialisations at CT University. The programme is also offered as a lateral entry and to be eligible for this programm at CT University the aspiring candidates need a minimum of 50% in their class 12. The specialisation offered for the four-year BTech programme are Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Electronics and Communication Engineering.

faqs.question: What BTech specialisations are offered at CT University?
faqs.answer: CT University offers the BTech programme under four specialisations Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Electronics and Communication Engineering. The university also offers lateral entry programmes with specialisations like Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Civil Engineering. Class 12 with a minimum of 50% is required to be eligible for these programme at CT University.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BTech lateral entry programme?
faqs.answer: BTech lateral entry is offered under three specialisations at CT University. The specialisations offered are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Chemical Engineering. To be eligible for the BTech programme at CT University the aspiring candidates need to take LEET exam. The total tuition fee for the BTech lateral entrey programme provided bt CT University is INR 5.1 lakh. The fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech course at CT University?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the BTech programme at CT University the candiates need to have a minimum of 50% in their class 12 from a recognised board, with any of the following combinations: Non-Medical, Commerce, or Arts. BTech is also offered as a three-year lateral entry programme and the candidates need to take LEET exam for admission to the lateral entry programme at CT University.

The total tuition fee for the BTech lateral entrey programme provided bt CT University is INR 5.1 lakh. The fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and everything.
reviews.review_text: They provide the facility of Wi-Fi and the Wi-Fi speed is too great The quality of the food is very great every week. The main course is filled with protein and vitamins, all we need. They didn't force us to focus on study, only they also said to play.

reviews.review_heading: CT University is in the heart of our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very luxurious. The food of the canteen is very hygienic and a good quality. The food in the mess is very hygienic and of good quality. There are all types of books available for the students in the library.

reviews.review_heading: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, facilities are very poor as compared to the fee we pay. The university charges Rs. 50,000-60,000 for the hostel but the quality of food is absolutely average. Room facilities are decent. I have also stayed in the university many times for night events and as far as I have seen, the university provides good quality food to reduce its expenses. Eating in the canteen is much better than eating in their mess.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.
reviews.review_text: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive environment, and steady placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both academic and practical learning. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi facility are available throughout the academic blocks. The mess food is average, with a set food menu for a week.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was present on the campus. Modern computer labs, digital classrooms, and a library with a variety of books were available. The hostel was also very good, and the mess and canteen were also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It was very satisfying to study here.
reviews.review_text:
There were various facilities that were offered to the students, like 24-hour hours lab, libraries, the smart classroom, Wi-Fi on whole campus, private access to the labs and computers, etc.
The hostels were neat, clean and airy. Moreover, the food provided in the mess and canteen was very hygienic, and the preparation is done in an appropriate way. Coaches were recruited for each and every game and the playing material was provided to the students in the hostel itself.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good facilities, and I suggest you join the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over 28 acres of land. The infrastructure is good. The teaching and learning facilities are 48 classrooms and 4 computer labs. All books are available in the library. The WiFi is enabled on the whole campus. The hostel facilities are excellent. Good beds and washrooms are good. The canteen provides many popular dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty available at this college.
reviews.review_text: CT University has good infrastructure for the BCA course. Computer labs are available for coding practice. The college provides Wi-Fi in the labs and library. Classrooms have proper seating and facilities. The college also offers good-quality hostel facilities. There are multiple sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is too good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is next level. The modern building looks great. There are a number of blocks, each containing classrooms and offices. All classrooms have Wi-Fi. All kinds of books are found in the library. The food quality in the canteen is also very good. There are medical facilities for students, as well as sports and games for physical fitness.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Teaching. Good Food. 100% Placement Guarantee. High Education Provided.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food is just like home. There is also a big playground for students. All the hostels are neat and clean. The food quality of the canteen is good. They conduct sports meets every year with winners' prizes. I recommend this college for you. Thank you.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and satisfied with the faculty of this college.
reviews.review_text: CT University has decent infrastructure for the BCA course. College management provides the best quality facilities to its students. The college campus has Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library, a canteen, sports facilities, a parking lot, etc., for the students. Hostel facilities are also provided to the students. Food in the hostel mess can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: CT University in Punjab (BCA).
reviews.review_text: There is a large, spacious library with a various collection of books, journals, articles, and updated newspapers. There is a large sports ground, and students are asked to play their interested sports. The food available at our college canteen is acceptable to eat.

reviews.review_heading: MBA Program from CT University.
reviews.review_text: CT University has decent infrastructure and good quality facilities. The College offers facilities like Wi-Fi, Labs, Library, Canteen, Classrooms, etc., to the students. Our College also offers hostels for the students. Food and other facilities of the College are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The university has its central library, and it has books that we want, but it does not allow outside material to be studied because it has so many sports grounds. There is a lack of laboratories, as the same labs are not in good condition. The classrooms are neat. Wi-Fi is enabled. The hostel's facilities are good.

data.description: Being one of the most prominent universities, CTU has developed some great connections with renowned brands such as Tata Motors, HDFC Bank, Mahindra and Mahindra, etc. Therefore, there is a fair count of opportunities present in the industry when it comes to the placement sector and even 70-75% of students are successfully placed at esteemed organisations.

The students can do internships after the first semester and get PPOs with good performance.

paragraphs: CTU Scholarships are offered to exemplary candidates in various slabs as per the percentage student score in the CT-SET to support them in every way possible. However, there are a few eligibility criteria set by the university and the government that the candidate must meet to avail of the scholarships.
All these scholarships are offered to students with a family income of $60,000 annually, some of which are listed below:

1. Scholarship based on Academic- These types of scholarships are the financial rewards given to students who have demonstrated outstanding academic achievement. They usually cover academic costs like tuition fees, books, etc.
2. Scholarship based on Financial aid- This type of scholarship is provided to students who demonstrate a strong need for financial assistance and are hard-working.
3. Scholarship based on CT-SET- CTU offers scholarships to laudable students in various slabs according to their performance in CT-SET.
4. Scholarship based on JEE- Every college has different requirements and a set of eligibility criteria. This type of scholarship is based on the performance of the student in JEE.
5. Scholarship based on Sport- This type of scholarship provides wings to athletes who are serious about making their career in the sports field.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (Hons.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is average but good infrastructure and facilities, with average placements every year.

review_content.Placements: In the 2024 placement session, 70% of students from our course were placed. The highest package was around 10 LPA, and the lowest was about 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Trident, Vardhman, and ICICI Bank. Approximately 70% of B.Com students were placed in these companies and several others. The top positions offered included junior accountant, banking associate, and tax consultant.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course was quite good. Comfortable lecture classes with top-notch technology were provided. In terms of facilities, smart boards for better learning were available. Tech labs were also there. The library was accessible to students, and each lab had Wi-Fi facilities as well. Hostel facilities were quite good, and the quality of food in the mess was also good, along with the canteen food, which was really good. Various sports events were conducted, providing opportunities for students to engage in different physical activities and showcase their talents.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure, environment, educated teachers, and clean washrooms.

review_content.Placements: As college is very good, many of the placements are applied, as recently I observed that one student got a 19 lacs package, which is huge, as I'm very impressed with this college. They also provide internships and many other activities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, college is very beautiful and spacious. There are my events, and consumer hubs are organized occasionally. All the classes are fully air-conditioned. Food of the mess is also good. Sports activities are also organized. All medical facilities are there.

faqs.answer: No, PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 does not accept direct admissions. Although students are selected on a merit basis for most of the offered courses, it is still important to clear the admission criteria. Students looking to apply need to fulfil both the eligibility and selection criteria to get a seat at the institute. The institute also conducts GDPI for admission to its MBA coures. For any queries, students can reach out to the institute's help desk.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at PCTE Group of Institutes Campus 2?

faqs.answer: MBA admission at Punjab College of Technical Education takes place through the CMAT entrance exam. Candidates applying for admission into the programme will have to prepare for that entrance exam. To prepare for the exam, candidates should have an idea of CMAT Syllabus. The syllabus of the entrance exam includes Quantitative Techniques & Data Interpretation, Logical Reasoning, Language Comprehension, General Awareness and Innovation & Entrepreneurship. To cover the syllabus, candidates must refer to recommended books and study material. They must also plan to cover all the topics in a time bound manner.
faqs.question: Q: How can I prepare for MBA admission at PCTE?

faqs.answer: At the time of filling out the PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 admission form, students are required to provide certain documents. Students must ensure the validity of these credentials. For Indian students marksheets and certificates of Class 10, 12, and Graduation (whichever is applicable) are required. For international students, A level certificate is needed. Students need to upload the documents in PDF format only.
faqs.question: Q: What are the documents required to fill PCTE Group of Institutes Campus 2 application forms?

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Punjab College of Technical Education?
overview_faqs.answer: Punjab College of Technical Education offers flagship programmes such as, MBA, BTech, and BSc with multiple specialisations, so that students can choose a programme of their liking. The cohort at the university is a mix of national and international students with close to 400 international students across 65 countries, which gives them a varied cohort and students can enjoy a diverse cohort from diverse backgrounds. In addition to that, the institute offers expeditions domestically and internationally for its cohort and conducts multiple events, such as fashion show, annual fest, inter-college business meets, international students week etc. Students will be able to enjoy state of the art infrastructure with a happening campus once they enroll into the programme.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at PCTE?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA at PCTE is INR 1.95 lakh to be paid over two years. Candidates applying for admission into the programme should note that candidates will have to pay an additional INR 16,400 as part of other fees to be paid for the programme. Thus candidate will have to pay INR 2.11 Lacs as fees for the MBA programme, over the course of two years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good for timepass, wandering.

content.Placements: There are no proper placements for the technical courses, and it's a total time-pass. They can help you join any teaching companies, not the technical company, because of this, you will not have the experience of a technical background or the exposure.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided to the students. Wi-Fi only works in the computer labs on the computers. Labs are decent, classrooms are also good, and the library is also decent. Hostels are there and they are fine, also provided with the mess food, there are no medical facilities, and also they don't give us time to do extra things, they just want us to attend lectures like nothing.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best in the Ludhiana region.

content.Placements: Around 90% of the last year MBAs got their placements from the college itself. The average placement package was around 4 Lacs from companies like Vardhman, Times of India, Ralson, ITC, Bajaj Finserv, and many more. Students are offered a wide range of roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college premises is great, with all the necessary facilities provided. Classrooms are equipped with top-quality surveillance cameras and smart boards for a better learning experience. There are canteens at every corner of the college campus, offering tasty and hygienic options to both students and faculty.
