individual_reviews.title: The college is average but good infrastructure and facilities, with average placements every year.

content.Placements: In the 2024 placement session, 70% of students from our course were placed. The highest package was around 10 LPA, and the lowest was about 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Trident, Vardhman, and ICICI Bank. Approximately 70% of B.Com students were placed in these companies and several others. The top positions offered included junior accountant, banking associate, and tax consultant.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course was quite good. Comfortable lecture classes with top-notch technology were provided. In terms of facilities, smart boards for better learning were available. Tech labs were also there. The library was accessible to students, and each lab had Wi-Fi facilities as well. Hostel facilities were quite good, and the quality of food in the mess was also good, along with the canteen food, which was really good. Various sports events were conducted, providing opportunities for students to engage in different physical activities and showcase their talents.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure, environment, educated teachers, and clean washrooms.

content.Placements: As college is very good, many of the placements are applied, as recently I observed that one student got a 19 lacs package, which is huge, as I'm very impressed with this college. They also provide internships and many other activities.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, college is very beautiful and spacious. There are my events, and consumer hubs are organized occasionally. All the classes are fully air-conditioned. Food of the mess is also good. Sports activities are also organized. All medical facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best college in terms of return on investment.

content.Placements: I am a passout of the MBA (Marketing/HR) 2020 batch. The college provides 100% placements, which means each and every student was offered a job. However, there were a couple of students who did not join their respective companies either because of the location constraints or because of the role or salary constraints, but the college did offer them jobs. The average package that was offered during our batch was 4.5 Lacs per annum. The lowest package was 2.8 lacs per annum, and the highest package offered was 10 lacs per annum, which was offered by Byju's company.

admission_process.title: PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 admission 2025is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers an extensive range of courses in undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes. These courses are offered in several fields, such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Science, and more. Students are selected either based on their academic scores or other selection rounds as specified by the institute.PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2application process commences online. Students interested in joining the institute can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility criteria, and admission process for PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2.

PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 course admissionis made based on the preset admission criteria. Admission to some of the courses is done on the basis of merit in the last qualifying exam. Students looking to join the UG courses need to complete Class 12 with relevant subjects. Similarly, PG admission requires candidates to complete graduation. Interested candidates can take a look at the following table to learn about the eligibility & selection criteria for popularPCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2courses:

PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 admission process includes several steps starting from the application. Students need to go through the multi-step process of the institute. The admission process for the institute mainly commences online. Aspiring candidates can follow the step-by-stepPCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -2 admission processexplained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Visit the official website of the institute and apply online for the desired programme by completing the application form. Upload the required documents and pay the application fees to complete the process.
Step 2: Selection process

Students are mainly selected based on their academic merit in the last qualifying exam. For admission into the undergraduate courses, students need to clear Class 12 in the relevant streams with relevant subjects. Similarly, to get into any of the postgraduate programmes, students need to complete graduation. For MBA admission, the final selection is made based on the GDPI conducted by the institute.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the fees to secure their spot at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Good for timepass, wandering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided to the students. Wi-Fi only works in the computer labs on the computers. Labs are decent, classrooms are also good, and the library is also decent. Hostels are there and they are fine, also provided with the mess food, there are no medical facilities, and also they don't give us time to do extra things, they just want us to attend lectures like nothing.

reviews.review_heading: Best in the Ludhiana region.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college premises is great, with all the necessary facilities provided. Classrooms are equipped with top-quality surveillance cameras and smart boards for a better learning experience. There are canteens at every corner of the college campus, offering tasty and hygienic options to both students and faculty.

Various sports events were conducted, providing opportunitie...

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure, environment, educated teachers, and clean washrooms.
reviews.review_text: Overall, college is very beautiful and spacious. There are my events, and consumer hubs are organized occasionally. All the classes are fully air-conditioned. Food of the mess is also good. Sports activities are also organized. All medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in terms of return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Although I was a day scholar and I did not stay in hostel, I always heard from my hostel friends that the hostel enables free Wi-Fi. Apart from that, all our classrooms were fully air-conditioned, and for smart learning, there was a projector in each and every classroom. Then there are conference halls and seminar halls for special guest lectures. A library where you can get any book issue for yourself for free because the cost of books is included in the semester fee itself. There are multiple ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is not good.
Not good in medical facilities.
The gym is closing this year.
The canteens are very good; they have 8 canteens on the main campus and for 3rd year BBA and MBA students, there is another campus that has 2 canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but less placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. We had basketball courts and volleyball courts, but they are like you have to pay for every sport you want to play. These people charge so much, yet they want more and more. Their education is not worth those rupees. That's it.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. The campus area was hygienic, neat, and clean. All the classrooms were air-conditioned. Wi-Fi facilities were available throughout the campus. There were good facilities, like a medical room and canteen. They also conducted matches and tournaments in every sport.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for personality development.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned. There are 10 different canteens that serve budget-friendly food. Our campus is neat and clean with clean washrooms. Sanitary pad dispenser is available in every girls' washroom. Regular inter-class games and an annual sports meet for the whole college are held.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Ludhiana, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: All the modern facilities are available, like a library, projectors, labs etc. I will give 4 stars for the facilities and 3 stars for the hostel. Overall, the campus is very good, neat and clean. The food is bad, and hygiene is not maintained. Food in the international hostel is even worse.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college known for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has comfortable facilities with an air-conditioning system in the classrooms. Moreso, boys' and girls' hostels are located in separate places and far away from each other to maintain security and discipline. The college also provides gym facilities to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life but placements will disappoint you and the fee is little expensive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and the classrooms are worth it. Labs are fine enough. Wi-Fi is generally not working fast. The library is not that useful. It has books only related to the curriculum that also for some technical courses only. Lawns are good and well maintained. There is also a big ground where sports activities are actually held. Hostels are spacious and clean. The food served is not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good quality education, teachers, good ambiance, and environment.
reviews.review_text: There were many international students in our college. Therefore, hostel facilities were very good. All the floors of college had Wi-Fi facility as well as classrooms were fully air conditioned. Food available in canteen and hostel mess was good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Punjab College of Technical Education is the best college for MBA .
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi everywhere. There are computer labs and for Science, there are labs too. Classrooms are big, equipped with AC and are very neat and clean. Library is very big around 100 students can sit at a time there. Hostel facility of campus is very good. Mainly those students who are from other cities live there and also foreign students also. Quality of food is good and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in terms of fees and infrastructure in the Ludhiana area.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided are good, and the quality of rooms is good as they are cleaned on daily basis. we have computer labs and chemical and physical labs. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. All the games are competed played on campus. Only rare students who are talented are accepted for university-level competitions. In terms of fees and infrastructure, it is very good.

college_info.intro:
Amity University Mumbai provides MBA and BTech as popular programmes at the UG and PG levels. The MBA specialisations include Banking and Finance, Real Estate and Urban Infrastructure, Human Resource Management, Construction Project Management, etc. Similarly, the BTech specialisations at Amity Mumbai include Computer Science Engineering , Biotechnology, Food Biotechnology, Mechanical, etc.
Amity University Mumbai graduates are working in sectors like Business Development, Education, Operations, Arts and Design, Marketing, etc. with eminent organisations like Accenture, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Capgemini, etc.
In addition to that, courses in humanities, design, law, commerce, science, and fashion are also available at Amity University Mumbai. The institute offers MTech for a duration of 2 years. For admission to MTech, candidates should fulfil the eligibility criteria and appear for the respective entrance exams including GATE, MHTCET MTech, JEE Main, and CUET. Below are the details regarding the Amity Mumbai's popular programmes, along with the eligibility and fee structure:
Check below videos for a glimpse of university offerings:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Amity University Mumbai offers over 300 courses at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. These courses cover the domains of Engineering, Management, Science, Computer Applications, Architecture etc., through more than 15 schools/ institutes. The university offers programmes in both full-time and part-time modes. Amity University Mumbai fees is a sum of multiple components namely tuition fees, security deposits, alumni fees etc. Some popular programmes offered in UG are BSc, BBA, BA, BDes, BArch, BCA, BPharm, etc. while MBA, MSc, MCA, MTech, MA, MPhil, MVoc, MSW are offered under PG.

faqs.answer: A:    MTech at Amity Mumbai is offered across 5 specialisations enlisted below:Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)Mechanical Engineering (ME)BiotechnologyEnvironmental BiotechnologyFood Biotechnology
faqs.question: What are the M.Tech specialisations available Amity University, Mumbai?

faqs.answer: A:    The percentage requirement for Amity Mumbai varies course-wise. Candidates must check the eligibility and requirement percentage for the course they are applying for. Below are top courses along with their percentage requirements:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with a 60% aggregate with PCM/PCBBArchClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/Biology/Technical VocationalBAClass 12MBAGraduation with a 50% aggregateMTechBTech/BE in relevant subject
faqs.question: What is the percentage required for Amity University Mumbai?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for BCA is INR 4.80 Lacs as per an unofficial source. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BCA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BCA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.
faqs.question: What is the fees of BCA in Amity University Mumbai?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Amity University Mumbai BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants can also get admission through CUET UG score. For admission to BBA International, the university conducts an English test followed by a PI round. Additionally, aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate can apply for BBA Banking & Finance and BBA General. Candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate for all other BBA specialisations. Candidates passing Class 12 with at least 80% aggregate are eligible for direct admission to BBA course. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. .

AMINOVA is our main event which is held every year where we get to attend many workshops and opportunities to participate in different activities. Amity not only helps us get good in academics but also help us to continue with the sport of our choice by letting us be part of Sangathan. There are many clubs such as cultural club, theatre club, poetry club which are very active and exciting.

content.Infrastructure: College is Equipped with good infrastructure, Good Dining mess, Wi-Fi 24/7 Availability with high-speed internet A Central library, Computer lab with licesed software in each computer to make easy for students to interact and SMART classroom with fully air-conditioned with projector, Wi-Fi and erognic setting that are ideal for management lectures and workshops, group activities etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics (Honours / Research) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great campus and faculty members, but average placement.

content.Placements: Placements in our course are moderate, with around 30–40% getting placed through campus, and the rest usually pursuing higher studies or research. The average package is about 3.5–4 LPA. For my course, most people like to pursue higher studies as it's best suited. But some do grab a position in the industry, mostly in Data Science, Data Analysis, or as lab assistants, or something like that.
content.Infrastructure: As for facilities, Amity makes sure that everything is provided very well. The library is top-notch, the classrooms are all AC, and the Wi-Fi also works well. Hostel rooms are pretty much okay; you have to share them with a roommate. They have both non-AC and AC accommodations, so you can choose as per your comfort. The mess food is okayish, but the canteen food is good.

The university offers BTech, BBA, BA, MBA etc. at the UG and PG level. The university also offers PhD and Diploma courses. Candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the university. The university also accepts national-level entrance exam scores, such as NATA, JEE Main, etc, for courses like BArch, BTech among others.The university offers more than 15 courses in Engineering, Arts, Science, Management and other streams. The application process at Amity University Mumbai is conducted online. Read the article to know more about Amity University Mumbai course admission 2026.

paragraphs: Amity University Mumbai admission is a multi-step process. Students looking for course admission must fill in the application form, pass the selection rounds and pay the application fee. Check the points below to know the detailed admission process:
1- Amity University Mumbai Application Process 2026

The admission process begins by filling the application form through the website. The application fees of INR 1,500 for Mumbai campus is competely waived off. The new users are required to generate login credentials and fill out an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Amity University Mumbai.
2- Amity University Mumbai Selection Process

Amity University Mumbai admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For most of the UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, the shortlisted candidates have to appear for the Personal Interview round as per course requirements. The students are selected based on Amity PhD Entrance Test +Interview by Faculty Member or All India National Level Competitive Examination or NET (viz. UGC / CSIR -NET in Category 1,2 or 3, ICMR- JRF/SRF, ICAR-AICE-JRF/SRF (PhD), GATE, GPAT, DST – INSPIRE, DBT-JRF etc.
3- The Final Offer Letter

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the final result will be declared. The information concerning selection will be communicated on the admission microsite as well as via Email and SMS. Selected candidates will get an admission letter along with important information such as semester fee, class commencement date, time, venue of the course, allotment of a hostel (If applied), scholarship (If any) and the list of documents required at the time of joining. Candidates also have to pay a certain amount as per theAmity University Mumbai feesstructure to secure their seats.

faqs.question: When will CUET result be declared?
faqs.answer: CUET result 2026 will be declared tentatively in first week of July 2026. Candidates who will appear for the exam can download their CUET scorecard online when released. The link to download the CUET scorecard will be available atCUET results 2026. Candidates will be required to enter the login credentials to view the CUET 2026 scorecard online. CUET scores are used for admission to various universities/colleges that candidates has applied for while filling the application form. Candidates must download and take the print of the CUET 2026 results when released. CUET UG 2026 exam will be held from May 11 to May 31.

faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?
faqs.answer: CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination isCBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

placement_report.college_name: Amity University Mumbai Placements 2025: Average Package, Median Package and Top Companies

placement_data.title: Amity University Mumbai Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 or 2024 placement report is yet to be released. However, the NIRF report 2025 has been released. As per the report, 154 MBA , 179 BTech, 12 MTech, 27 BPlan, 12 BArch, 77 BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB and 6 LLM students were placed during the Amity University Mumbai placements 2024.

The median salary offered to MBA students during the 2024 drive was INR 6.5 LPA. For BTech and MTech courses, the median salary offered was INR 6.20 LPA and INR 4.25 LPA, respectively. In addition to this, the median salary for Law courses are between INR 4 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Amity University Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered during Amity University Mumbai placements 2024 is yet to be published on the official website. Once it is released, it will be updated on this page. Meanwhile, let’s take a look at the median packages offered during Amity University Mumbai placements 2024 in the table below: Course Median Package (2024) BPlan INR 3 LPA BTech INR 6.20 LPA MTech INR 4.25 LPA MBA INR 6.50 LPA BArch INR 3.50 LPA BA LLB (Hons), BBA LLB (Hons), BCom LLB (Hons) INR 5.20 LPA LLM INR 4 LPA Note : The above-mentioned data is gathered from the Amity University Mumbai Engineering, Management, Architecture and Law NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Amity University, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The official placement report has not been disclosed. Looking at the NIRF report 2025, the median salary offered to MBA students during the 2024 placements was INR 6.5 LPA. Out of 174 MBA students 154 were placed during the 2024 drive. Out of 239 BTech students 179 were placed and out of 16 M.Tech students 12 were placed in 2024. The median salary for BTech and M.Tech stood at INR 6.20 LPA and INR 4.25 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How are the MBA placements at Amity University Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Amity University Mumbai has a great track record of MBA placements. According to the Management NIRF report 2025, a total of 154 MBA students were placed out of total 174 students during Amity University Mumbai MBA placements 2024. Further, the median package offered to MBA students during the 2024 placement drive was INR 6.5 LPA. The key highlights of MBA placements for the Class of 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2024) Median package offered INR 6.5 LPA Total students 174 Total students placed 154 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Amity University Mumbai Management NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: What is the placement package offered to MBA students during Amity University Mumbai placements?
faqs.answer: The median package offered during Amity University Mumbai MBA placements 2024 was INR 6.50 LPA. Earlier, the median package offered in 2023 was INR 6 LPA. In 2022 it was INR 5.40 LPA. Comparing the salary trends, an improving trend was recorded in the MBA median package from 2022 to 2024.

faqs.question: Who were the top recruiters at Amity University Mumbai placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The University attracted various eminent recruiters annually for placement sessions. These recruiters offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. The following is a list of a few top companies that were a part of the recent placement drive: Amity Mumbai Top Recruiters Infosys Deloitte Nestle Amazon IBM Airtel Havells Infosys Deloitte Axis Bank Wipro HCL

faqs.question: How many students were placed during the Amity Mumbai MBA placements 2023?
faqs.answer: According to the NIRF report 2023, 198 MBA students were placed out of total 204 students during Amity University Mumbai MBA placements 2022 . Earlier, in 2020, 195 students were placed out of total 242 students. When we go back to 2020 placements, 138 students were placed out of total 178 students.

The BPlan and BArch median salary offered during Amity University Mumbai placements 2024 was INR 3 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA. The UG 5-year Law courses recorded a median salary of INR 5.2 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fees of BA in Amity University Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The overall fee of BA course at Amity University Mumbai range from INR 2.8 Lacs - INR 11.3 lakh . The BA fee might vary per the BA course specialisations, for example, the tuition fee for the four year BA in Applied Psychology (Honours / Research) is around INR 4 lakh . Candidates must make sure to pay the course fee once they receive the admission offer letter. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Which companies participated in Amity University Mumbai placements?
faqs.answer: The University has hosted wide range of recruiters from diverse sectors. This included well known names such as Nestle, Deloitte, Infosys, IBM, Amazon, Wipro, HCL Technologies and many others.

faqs.question: How are the MBA placements at Amity University Mumbai?

faqs.question: What is the placement package offered to MBA students during Amity University Mumbai placements?
faqs.answer: The median package offered during Amity University Mumbai MBA placements 2024 was INR 6.50 LPA. Earlier, the median package offered in 2023 was INR 6 LPA. In 2022 it was INR 5.40 LPA. Comparing the salary trends, an improving trend was recorded in the MBA median package from 2022 to 2024.

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Amity University Mumbai outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Amity University Mumbai's rankings in 'Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2026, Amity University Mumbai fell 400 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Amity University Mumbai fell 134 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel.description: Amity University provides separate hostel facility for boys and girls with accommodating capacity of 340 inmates. The accommodation is apartment style with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college is better than other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The student of Amity College, Mumbai. I like to share that my college is better than a private institute. The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department are like Wi-Fi. Classrooms, labs, ground, washrooms, etc., are very good according to the feedback taken from students.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department include Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, ground, washrooms, etc., and they are very good according to the feedback from students.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in the placement section.
reviews.review_text: The student of Amity University Mumbai. I like to share that my college is better than a private institute. The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department were like Wi-Fi. Classroom labs, grounds, washrooms, etc., are very good according to the fees taken from students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall its a Good college For Bachelors .
reviews.review_text: College is Equipped with good infrastructure, Good Dining mess, Wi-Fi 24/7 Availability with high-speed internet A Central library, Computer lab with licesed software in each computer to make easy for students to interact and SMART classroom with fully air-conditioned with projector, Wi-Fi and erognic setting that are ideal for management lectures and workshops, group activities etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and faculty members, but average placement.
reviews.review_text: As for facilities, Amity makes sure that everything is provided very well. The library is top-notch, the classrooms are all AC, and the Wi-Fi also works well. Hostel rooms are pretty much okay; you have to share them with a roommate. They have both non-AC and AC accommodations, so you can choose as per your comfort. The mess food is okayish, but the canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college in Mumbai to study English. Amazing faculty members and crowd.
reviews.review_text: Before 2025, Amity University Mumbai only had a small library. But since this year they have opened a new library, relevant books, seating arrangements, and good security as without scanning your face you won't be able to enter. There is an online library where they will let you use the computers for study, and a vast number of books are offered to choose from. You don't even need to buy the books. Wi-Fi is available as well. Hostel is good. Food is also decent. Sports event is vastly enjoyed an...

reviews.review_heading: College is great just need some more expose for the real world.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are amazing which include high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the campus premises, full hi-tech labs, and even centralized AC in whole building. Quality of food is above average just a little expensive. But rest all the facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college. It just needs more campus placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are excellent including Wi-Fi, AC, and environment inside college buildings. Food quality, medical and sports facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and overall great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our course is decent. Classrooms are good with air-conditioning and are clean. Washrooms are decent and hostel life is also not bad. Availability of good food is there in cafeteria. Canteens are provided and overall a good experience in my opinion.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and nice campus.
reviews.review_text: Quality of facilities of hostel is very good and focus on sports are main, just the food quality changes. The facility and infrastructure available for our course are very good. Classrooms are big and enough to handle 50 above students. Library is newly developed.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good and faculty members are also good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and Wi-Fi facilities are very good. The classroom has AC by which you can study well in the classroom smoothly and can concentrate on studies while studying in classroom also. The food of Wok Hong is best in Amity.

reviews.review_heading: Opportunity is good but you have to create for yourself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good. Lab is good but there are not 100% used students it's locked sometimes. Department have talented students but college don't give proper knowledge to utilize those skills and grow those talent skills. Most of the students came and did something else in life.

reviews.review_heading: It is good but can be better.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. Quality of food in mess and canteen is average. Sports are good. There should be more hostel facilities. Private shops are there in terms of food like Pizza Hut and Starbucks as we don't have much food options over here.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University - Not perfect but overall good campus and enjoyable experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. The university overall has a great look and atmosphere. It is also constantly building upon its infrastructure. Recently we have got a much new and more improved library which is my personal favorite for work. I stay in a hostel and its decent living there with good grooming and AC. There are also always sports activities like football, badminton, tennis, basketball, etc. You can take part in that always keep you entertained.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with course, infrastructure, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, facilitating dynamic growth and progress. It involves fully functional animation labs, photography and filming studios, light and sound rooms, etc. Along with common facilities like auditorium, libraries, and playgrounds.

data.description: Amity Mumbai faculty include qualified educators with strong educational background. It has more than 400 distinguished faculty, scientists, and staff. Currently, Professor (Dr.) Gautam Shrirangrao Gawali is the Dean Student Welfare and Director of Amity University Mumbai. The esteemed faculty members of the university have proven excellence in their fields with 541 patents, by authoring 500 books and 6,000 published papers.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amity University, Mumbai

likes.text: Every year it invites reputed organisations from various fields like marketing, law, production, IT, etc., to the campus for placement purpose.
Many students were also placed in well-reputed companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Mahindra Logistics, IBM, Zee, MSL, and many more.

Amity University, Mumbai is a huge campus with a well-stocked library, air-conditioned classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi facility, and well-equipped laboratories.

paragraphs: Amity University Mumbai offers various scholarships to meritorious students to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at Amity University Mumbai will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the University has chosen to avail the scholarship.
Amity University Mumbai will provide a concession in fees based on scores scored by students in the entrance exams such as CUET, CAT, MAT, GRE, and exams from other central/ State boards of India.

The university offers scholarships to UG and PG students based on merit and means. Furthermore, those who clear certain competitive exams can get up to 100% fee waivers. Some of the Amity University Mumbai scholarships with their criteria are listed below:

faqs.question: What is the MBBS course fee at Parul University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, studying at Parul University, Goa is not free. Candidates must pay the course fee which ranges between INR 40K to INR 1.20 Lacs. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. However, the university offers several scholarships with fee waivers. Eligible candidates can avail the benefits of the scholarship programs.
faqs.question: Is studying at Parul University Goa free?

faqs.answer: A:    Parul University Vadodara is a private university that was established under the Gujarat Private Universities (Second Amendment ACT and is accredited with an A+ Grade by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council), NABH, Central Council for Homeopathy, Bar Council of India, and the National Medical Commission. Being a private university, the fee for various courses can be a little high but the students can apply for scholarships offered by the university. The scholarships offered by the university are Cultural Scholarships, Sports Scholarships, and Defence Scholarships.
faqs.question: Is Parul University expensive?

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation, Hospitality, Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: From my seniors' passing out batch for BBA Aviation, the placement season is good with approximately 80 percent of students securing offers before graduation. I am yet to know more about it. Overall, it is good with good packages, which I heard from my seniors who recently got placements. Students are even getting the opportunity to go abroad for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.

review_content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 23 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies areCognizant and Infosys for B.Tech and MBA. Many who got placed are the ones who were already placed somewhere or did an interview and had enough skills, so if you want to get an internship or a job, be ready to at least learn skills, as the company here selects a few.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course offered in Parul University?

faqs.answer: Parul University offers a four-year BTech course in the stream of Engineering. This course is taught by the Faculty of Engineering & Technology more than 15 specialisations. Parul University also offers four Industry Embedded BTech courses, namely CSE/ IT with Microsoft, CSE/ IT with Quick Heal, CSE/ IT with SAP and CSE/ IT with Oracle. faqs.answer: Parul University Online, Vadodara offers only one course in the stream of Management, i.e., MBA Online. This is a two-year-long online course. Students can pursue MBA Online in 20 Industry-centric specialisations. The institute has a collaboration with international universities located in France, UK and Japan. Students will study one year of this course in online mode at Parul University and a final year at an International University.
faqs.question: Q: What course does Parul University Online offer?

faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers an integrated BBA + MBA course in the stream of Management for a duration of four years. There is also an option to study a Diploma in Business Administration + Bachelor of Business Administration (DBA + BBA) course for a duration of five years. All of these courses are taught by the Faculty of Management Studies. In these courses, students get a combined UG & PG degree of BBA + MBA and Diploma + UG degree upon completion of the course. Candidates are required to pass Class 12 with English as the main subject from a recongised board for admission to the integrated course.

course_faqs.question: Is BPharma at Parul University Ahmedabad a good choice?
course_faqs.answer: Parul University offers BPharma for 4 years. Admission to this course is based on merit and entrance. Candidates must score a minimum of 50% aggregate in Class 12 and pass institution-level exams. The fee for BPharm may vary from INR 3.3 Lacs to INR 4.4 Lakh.

course_faqs.question: Is B.Pharm (lateral entry) course available at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University offers a BPharm (lateral entry) course. It is a three-year course divided into six semesters. Candidates selected for admission are directly admitted to the second year of the course. Admission to the programme shall be granted on a merit basis. The eligible students can visit the university website to register and apply.

course_faqs.question: Which category has to pay more fees for BPharm courses at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The BPharm fees at Parul University is higher for the candidates who belong to the NRI category. Students of the NRI category have to pay INR 7.8 Lacs as BPharm fees. On the other hand, candidates who belong to the Management Quota are required to pay INR 5.4 Lacs for the BPharm course at Parul University. This difference in BPharm fees only applies to the first year admissions a Parul University. The BPharm fees for the lateral entry students is the same across all categories.

course_faqs.question: What is the BPharm fees for lateral entry students at Parul University?
course_faqs.answer: The Parul University BPharm fees for lateral entry student is the same for both Management Quota and NRI students. For NRI students, the BPharm lateral entry fees is INR 5.4 lakh. The fees is charged on per annum basis in three equal instalments. The fees is a combination of the tuition fees and university fees for Parul University BPharm lateral entry course.

overview_faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University good for BHMS?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers 5.5 years BHMS or Bachelor of Homoepathic Medicine and Surgery programme at the UG level. Students pursuing BHMS are open to ample placement opportunities. Parul University also provides placements to students. The overall the highest package offered to students is INR 60 LPA and average is INR 4-INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Is Parul University in Vadodara, Gujarat good for BBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Parul University offers a good number of diversity in specialisations. Candidates can pursue a BBA course across 23 specialisations at Parul University. Those who get a degree of BBA from Parul University can build careers in Consultancy, Digital Marketing, Finance, Advertising, Banking, etc. The overall placement rate is also good at the university as per the statistics witnessed during the placement drive of the year 2022, where the highest package was INR 30 LPA and INR 7 LPA. Further, the department is equipped with advanced laboratories and classrooms that provide vital practical training exposure to students.

overview_faqs.question: Is studying at Parul University Goa free?
overview_faqs.answer: No, studying at Parul University, Goa is not free. Candidates must pay the course fee which ranges between INR 40K to INR 1.20 Lacs. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. However, the university offers several scholarships with fee waivers. Eligible candidates can avail the benefits of the scholarship programs.

review_summary.college_name: Parul University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.

content.Placements: Hence, I’m still a student, so I’m not eligible for the placement cell till now, but the students get posted to many companies, clinics, or hospitals with great opportunities and salary. What I know is that they are providing the best hospital exposure in the university itself.
content.Infrastructure: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: There's a placement policy in my college which gives us training for free, and the top recruiting companies of my course are Indigo and Hitech Digital Solutions. Though there is a penalty if we don't follow the placement policy, it's fair enough to have it.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation, Hospitality, Travel and Tourism Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: From my seniors' passing out batch for BBA Aviation, the placement season is good with approximately 80 percent of students securing offers before graduation. I am yet to know more about it. Overall, it is good with good packages, which I heard from my seniors who recently got placements. Students are even getting the opportunity to go abroad for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.

content.Placements: 50-60 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 23 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies areCognizant and Infosys for B.Tech and MBA. Many who got placed are the ones who were already placed somewhere or did an interview and had enough skills, so if you want to get an internship or a job, be ready to at least learn skills, as the company here selects a few.
content.Infrastructure: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college, not the best.

content.Placements: Good placement, 85% B.Tech CSE batch placed. The highest package is 27 LPA, the lowest: 2.5 LPA, average is 5.7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, Amazon. Roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, Cloud Engineer, Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

paragraphs: Parul University offers admission to all the UG and PG based on merit or entrance-exam scores. Aspirants need to meet the eligibility to get admission in the university. Check below steps for Parul University admission process:
Step 1: Parul University Application Process 2026

The application mode is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://admissions.paruluniversity.ac.in) of the university. Candidates need to select a course and fill out the details in the application form.
Step 2: Selection rounds

Parul University offers admission to most of the courses based on qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The university conductsPU DATfor admission to BDes and MDes courses. The university also accepts NEET, NATA, JEE Main Paper-2, etc. for specific courses.
Step 3: Final admission

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification to finalise the admission. Aspirants need to payParul University Feesto confirm their seat in the college as per the university's fee structure.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Parul University admission are open. Students who whish to get admission to the courses offered at Parul University can apply now. Parul University application form is available online at university website. Students who fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria can apply online.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University Vadodara offers seats to applicants based on their merit in the qualifying exam or entrance test. The selection for courses such as BDes, MDes, BArch, BPT, BAMS, etc. is entrance-based. For most of the courses, admission is offered based on qualifying exam scores of the aspirants. Selected candidates have to report at the campus for document verification. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Is admission to Parul University Ahmedabad merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Parul University Ahmedabad offers admission to several UG courses such as BSc, BHMS, BPharma, and BPT based on Class 12 minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12. However, for courses such as BHMS, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as NEET. Apart from this, for primary qualification of PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for MBBS in Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University MBBS Admission Process 2024Students who are interested in taking admission for 2024 at Parul University MBBS can check the points mentioned below:Parul University MBBS Application Process 2024The admission process starts with filling Parul University MBBS application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website of Parul University MBBS to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment.Parul University MBBS Selection ProcessStudents will be selected on basis of NEET entrance exam scores.Parul University MBBS Admission ConfirmationAfter completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

placement_data.title: Parul University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package recorded during Parul University placement 2025 stood at INR 45 LPA . This package was offered to the student of the Faculty of Hotel Management & Catering Technology batch 2025 by Crowne Plaza. The participating recruiters offered more than 2500 job offers to the batch 2025 of courses like BTech , MBA , BPharma , BDes , and MCA , etc. The students secured over 900 Dream offers and more than 100 Super Dream offers from the participating recruiters. Some of the top recruiters of who visited the Parul University campus for 2025 placements include Amazon, IBM, TCS, Tech Mahindra, PwC, Wipro, Adani Group, Accenture, Godrej, H&M, Radission Blue, Crowne Plaza, etc.

Earlier, the highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2024 stood at INR 46 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. More than 1,300 recruiters visited the campus in 2024 and selected 2,212 students.

faqs.answer: The highest and average package offered during Parul University placements 2025 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters of Parul University MBA placements 2025 include Accenture, Deloitte, Colgate, Airtel, Godrej, Aditya Birla Group, Berger Paints, Coca Cola, etc.

The below table mentions tuition fee for the BDes programme: Course Total Tuition Fee BDes INR 5.1 lakh to INR 11 lakh NOTE: The total tuition fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. faqs.question: What is the MBA tuition fee at Parul University?
faqs.answer: Parul University MBA tuition fee is between INR 1.5 Lacs to INR 8.8 lakh. Stuents have to pay the tutition fee during the admission. Students must note that the mentioned fee detail is taken from the university website and is subject to changed.

nirf.description:
Parul University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University climbed 6 ranks to #41 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'Innovation' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Parul University's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Parul University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

hostel.description: Parul University has established an in-house residential complex with separate provision for boys and girls with a capacity of accommodating the 7000+ student. The university has on-campus amenities such as gymnasium, swimming pool, open-air theatre, banking service and hospital are also available to the students. Separate hostel blocks for NRIs and International students equipped with air conditioner and other modern facilities are also available. There are Five Messes on campus which serve nutritious breakfast, lunch, high tea and dinner to the hostel residents.
facilities: Hostel: The university has on-campus amenities such as a swimming pool, gymnasium, open-air theatre, banking services, and others
Library: Parul University has various books on General Knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, and previous volumes of journals/ magazines
Cafeteria: All the hostels of the university have spacious dining halls.

library.description: Parul University has 10 libraries with more than 24000 books, 15825 online journals/magazines, 1315 print journals/magazines, 30 news dailies, reference section contains encyclopedias, books on general knowledge and competitive exams, dictionaries, previous volumes of journals/magazines and remote access to thousands of libraries through DELNET and also to various reference and plagiarism software. All libraries are linked to the central library “Gyanoday Bhawan” and are fully computerized with barcode system for issue and return of books. More than 20000 students avail book bank facility every year from these libraries at the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Hand Ball Court, Table Tennis

Moreover, there are food courts and college canteens where the students can go for tea, coffee, cold drinks, ice cream, snacks and different varieties of food throughout the day. The university also has Nescafe outlets on campus for students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: The best university India has to offer, both national and international.
reviews.review_text: Good LED TV for PPT, projector, library, easy study material access, and many more things, with great university infrastructure and the best teaching staff. The most important thing is that we are allowed to learn many more things despite the course we have taken.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm a day scholar, and the bus facilities are amazing. My friends live in a hostel, and I've heard about some hostel facilities that are good enough. The campus is very interesting and fun to be in. The bus timings align perfectly with our timetable.

reviews.review_heading: I absolutely loved it. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, with every necessity provided for the students to use. It has secure Wi-Fi connections. There is a big library with books on so many courses. Hostels of Parul University are good and cozy for living. Free medical support is provided to students of this university in the Parul Hospital. The mess food is of all different kinds and varieties. The food tastes good. We have huge playgrounds and an arena for indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is not so good, but the infrastructure is good, and also the exposure it gives.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library is available. The quality of the medicine is available with free checkups. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the hostel, library, or even food courts. The labs are also new, so nothing is needed. Canteen food is average, and they do provide fest and all.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, not the best.
reviews.review_text: CSE dept: Modern labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, CSE library, AI/ML labs. Hostels are clean. The hostel has AC/Non-AC rooms, 24/7 Wi-Fi, gym, sports grounds, hospital, average mess food (Guj/North Indian), canteens, ATMs. Room conditions depend on what you pay.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel is bad, placements are mid, campus is really good, hostel food is mid again.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay. There are fans but no ACs, so it gets noisy and hot, especially in summers. Overall infrastructure is really good. It has a library, study room, labs, and they are pretty good too. Mess food is mid. They have added digital boards and better video players, and it’s done.

reviews.review_heading: Positive student experience with some areas for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for my course/department are excellent, including full-speed unlimited Wi-Fi, classrooms with smart boards, benches with plugs, a huge library, a separate lab building, and a MAC lab. Hostel facilities are good, and the food quality in the mess is also good. Medical facilities are available, as the university has its own hospital. Sports and games options are plentiful, including outdoor and indoor activities, horse riding, swimming, and a gymnasium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Parul Institute of LawReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, best extracurricular activities, average study.
reviews.review_text: There are properly facilitated classrooms, Wi-Fi is available, and there is a big library, but it is not air-conditioned. Hostels are good, but the mess is not that good. However, the canteen and cafés are the best. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in terrible condition. In the name of projector screens, the wall has been covered with a thick layer of lime, and benches are pretty old too. The hostel is in poor condition, and lights are not working properly. The cleaning staff members are not maintaining cleanliness. The issue of food is also very disturbing for students, as the taste is very bad. Medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Parul University is best for events and campus life, but strict rules which I don't like.
reviews.review_text: Basically, I like the infrastructure. I am a BBA aviation student, so in my department, there's an aviation infrastructure plan class and aviation dummies. The courses are good, my department is well-furnished, and work is going on. It's under construction. More departments are also good for this, like the design department and the B.Tech building. It is a good campus, and the facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Okay, the college is really nice.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best and are in a neat and clean environment. The atmosphere of the college is too good. I don’t know about the mess, but in canteens and all stalls, there is good food. Sports are also a part of our study, and the facilities are also good, and the library is also very comfy.

reviews.review_heading: Parul is a decent private university in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, I would say. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms have good long benches with smart boards in every class. There are many libraries on the campus. I personally used the one in the admin block. You will find various books related to your subjects there, along with desktops in the library to be used for academic purposes.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students take admission in this college in any other courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is average. The infrastructure in the hostel is not good because we don't get enough hot water. The food quality is also not good. The mess staff members and reactors also sometimes do not behave properly. It looks like we are surviving for our lives, and the other facilities of the hostel are average.

reviews.review_heading: I like the college for its events and the quality of studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are basic, which helps us prepare a foundation, but to grow. We need to seek help from other universities, like government colleges, especially during our major projects. Facilities like a hostel, I don’t have an idea, as I am a day scholar, but sports and games are excellent here. I enjoy indoor sports in my free time, and the canteen is also good on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and social life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome, and the facilities that we have are very good. Wi-Fi is so good, and classrooms are good and hygienic. The library is so great, and the reading area is too spacious, and we see the hostel facilities are awesome.

review_content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. Recruiting companies include Technicolor, Adobe, Amazon, Red Chili, Disney, etc. Around 20% of students got internships at startups like Swiggy, Zepto, and Magic Pin.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are properly ventilated. Each classroom has an air conditioner with proper lighting. They provide you with a desktop for hands-on practice after or during your class. They also have a separate floor for practical VFX sessions. There is no mess, but the area where the institute is located has many shops to get snacks. They do not have hostels or medical facilities. You have to get your accommodation on your own.

admission_overview.college_name: Arena Animation Borivali Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application, Selection Process

paragraphs: Arena Animation, Borivali admission 2025 inquiry portal is open. Admission to the institution is based on qualifying the eligibility criteria. The institute offers certificate courses in the fields of Animation,VFX, Gaming, and various other streams. Arena Animation's programmes are certified and recognised by Media & Entertainment Skills Council (MESC). On completion ofArena Animation Borivalicourses, candidates are awarded a certificate of successful course completion.

For Arena Animation Borivali course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility requirements of the courses as per the institution's admission guidelines. Eligible candidates can fill out the application form for admission. No other selection round or criteria is there for admissions. In the table below, the eligibility criteria forArena certificate coursesare mentioned:
Certificate
(1 to 28 months)
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Arena Animation Borivali feeincludes multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, mess, and other security deposits. There are a few components that are charged one-time. Check out the tuition fee for Arena Animation Borivali courses in the below table:

NOTE:The fee range mentioned here is inclusive of only some of the certificate courses. Additionally, it is taken from Arena Animation's official website, hence, the fee can vary for the Mumbai centre.

Arena Animation Borivali has a pretty simple admission process, which doesn't involve any complex selection process. All candidates must do is fulfill the eligibility criteria and directly apply for their desired course. Find the admission procedure below:
Step 1: Application form

Candidates must visit the Arena Animation Borivali ( https://www.arena-multimedia.com/in/en/ ) official website. Candidates can also fill out the inquiry form for information. The application form will be available on the website. Candidates must fill the application form with all details and submit it with the required fee.
Step 2: Admission Finalisations

After filling out the form, candidates can be asked to submit the required documents and pay the admission fee for admission confirmation. The institute then shall inform the student regarding the class schedule and other important details.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Quite innovative, some faculty (usually young ones) welcome new ideas. 100 % placement. College will definitely give you a fine education should you choose to attend. Professors are accessible and open, and professors give out their home numbers with regularity. People are generally pretty friendly, although you might get sick of the lack of a significant social scene. It has a good national reputation with strong Alumni networks. You will be prepared to work with top multinationals.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good and best for the student.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students from our course are placed through campus recruitment, while others opted for higher studies or off-campus roles. The highest package offered is about 11 LPA, whereas the lowest package is around 3 LPA. The average package of the course remained close to 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies included reputed firms like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, and Capgemini. Nearly 65% of students received internship opportunities in IT companies, startups, and local firms. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, Business Analyst, and System Engineer.

faqs.question: What is the CEET cutoff for Industrial Design Centre IIT Bombay 2024?
faqs.answer: The CEET cutoff for admission to Industrial Design Centre (IDC) in IIT Bombay for the batch 2024 is not out yet. In general, the admission for the Master of Design (M.Des) course occur based on the Common Entrance Examination for Design (CEED). As a comparison, the previous year’s cutoffs for the courses related to different concentrations in design vary from 60 percentile to 80 percentile. The latest information about the cut offs can be found from the IIT Bombay official site.

faqs.question: How can I get into Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.DesThe candidate should have been born on or after October 1,  1998 if belonging to the OPEN/EWS/OBC-NCL category and, on or after October 1,  1993 if belonging to the SC, STor PwD category.M.DesCandidate who have completed diploma/post graduate degree graduation from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidate who have passed the GD Arts Diploma programme (10+5 level) by July 2023 is also eligible to apply.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Industrial Design Centre IIT Bombay for admission to M.Des.?
faqs.answer: The Industrial Design Centre (IDC) of the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Bombay accepts the Common Entrance Examination for Design (CEED) for admission to the M.Des. program. To be eligible for the course, the candidates must have completed a degree of a minimum of 3 years (after 10+2 level), or must be appearing for the final examination of such a program by July 2024 are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: Is Industrial Design Centre IIT Bombay hard to get?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Industrial Design Centre IIT Bombay can be competitive. Their minimum eligibility is easy to meet but beating the competition can be challenging. The admission committee decides your admission on the overall criteria of your previous academic performance, work experience, performance in design test, and performance in interview, portfolio, and CEED scores. Their test is about one and a half hours duration which will test your ability to creatively and appropriately solve simple design problems.

description: The UCEED 2026 results for the BDes course have been released, with counselling set to start on Apr 21, 2026.

Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay UCEED cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the B.Des course. In the meantime, candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the UCEED 2025 first and last round cutoff details.

In 2025, the Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay B.Des cutoff 2025 was 14 in the last round for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Check out the table below to view the UCEED 2025 cutoff for the General category under the AI quota.

For the General AI quota, the UCEED 2025 cutoff for B.Des admission was 14 in the last round. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course was 14, while in 2023, it was 16. So, analysing the last three years' cutoff data, it is evident that UCEED cutoff ranks saw an inconsistency in the last round closing rank for B.Des admission over three years.

Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay accepts the UCEED entrance exam to shortlist students for B.Des admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important UCEED 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

The UCEED 2025 counselling was concluded with the release of the five seat allotment rounds. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise UCEED cutoff lists from the table below for admission to the B.Des course at Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay.

UCEED 2024 Seat Allotment results are out for B.Des admission. Industrial Design Centre - IIT Bombay accepts UCEED scores for admission to the BDes course.
